select adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.StateCode as initialStateCode from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

SELECT max(l.LimitSequence) as limitCheck FROM PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt ,TransactionType tt WHERE l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionTypeKey=tt.TransactionTypeKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.StateCode as initialStateCode from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select adds.AddressKey,adds.Address1,adds.Address2,adds.StateCode,adds.AddressTypeKey,adds.Street, adds.city as CityText, adds.CountyDesc as CountyText,adds.cityKey as CitySelect, (CASE WHEN adds.zip4 is not null THEN adds.zip+'-'+adds.zip4 ELSE adds.zip END) as Zip,(select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, (CASE p.PolicyStatusKey WHEN '2' THEN CASE isNull(pt.ProducerCode,'') WHEN '' THEN s.StatusDesc + '(R)' ELSE s.StatusDesc + '(R) (P)' END ELSE CASE isNull(pt.ProducerCode,'') WHEN '' THEN s.StatusDesc ELSE s.StatusDesc + '(P)' END END) as headerStatusDesc,(select IsBusinessActiveLW from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IsBusinessActiveLW, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, pt.ProducerCode,pt.StatusKey from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt,Policy p,Status s, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and p.policykey=pt.policykey and pt.statuskey=s.statuskey and pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select top 1 pt.ProducerCode, pt.TransactionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.MarketableProductKey = 2 and pc.CoverageKey = 3 and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=(select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence=(select min(CoverageSequence)from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

sqlMap.select: select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateDeductible) as DeductibleAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) +'/' +dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as LimitAmount, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(q.TotalPremiumFirstRange)+'-'+dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremiumFirstRange, pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as InvoicedPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.ManualPremium) as ManualPremium, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, (CASE pc.IsClaimExpensesType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) as IsClaimExpensesType, (CASE pc.IsClaimOptionType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) as IsClaimOptionType, (CASE pc.IsDollarDefense WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) as IsDollarDefenseText,(CASE pc.IsManualPremium WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Manual' ELSE 'Auto' END) as IsManualPremiumText, pc.IsDollarDefense as IsDollarDefense, pc.IsManualPremium as IsManualPremium, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, rt.RatingTraceSequence from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ProducerId, ProducerCode, LogoImagePath, SPContactName, SPContactAddress, SPWebsite, SPCompanyName, SPPhoneNumber, CallImagePath, SPConatctEmailId, IsActive, ProducerName, NewCommission, RenewalCommission, State, StreetAddress, SPZip, SPCity, Producer_email, Date_added, SendQuoteLetter, SendRenewalSolicitation, Archive, SubProducerAccess, Signature, Fax, IndicationAccess, BillingContactName, BillingContactNumber, BillingContactEmail, SignatureText, CreditcardAccess, EmailSignature, SignatureText2, CompleteAddress, SignatureText3, IsDriect from SubProducer where ProducerCode = #ProducerCode#

select p.PolicyNumber, (CASE p.IsFullQuote WHEN 'Y' THEN 'FQ' ELSE 'QQ' END) as Quote_Type, pt.StatusKey, pt.StatusKey as StatusKey_Prev from PolicyTransaction pt, Policy p where p.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence=#TransactionSequence#

select pt.StatusKey as OldStatusKey, s.StatusDesc as headerStatusDescUpdated from PolicyTransaction pt, Policy p, Status s where p.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey = pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence=#TransactionSequence#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, Comment = null where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update Quote set IsThisOptionFinalised=null,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# ,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, Comment=#Comment# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, AcceptanceDate=#AcceptanceDate# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update PolicyTransaction set StatusKey=2,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

update FirmLW set LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#, FirstReviewUserID=#FirstReviewUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsViewed='Y' where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsLoginMailSent='Y' where VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update FirmLW set isAppCompleted=null,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update Policy set isUncompletedData='Y', LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# , LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
update BrokerageLW set isArchived='True', LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# , LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# where BrokeragePolicyKey = #BrokeragePolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select distinct f.QuoteExpiryDate, f.ContactPerson,p.PolicyKey,ad.Address1,a.AccountName,ad.Zip,ad.Address2,a.AccountKey,p.AccountID,ad.City,s.StateDesc,CONVERT(varchar,pt.PolicyExpirationDate,101) as ExpirationDate from FirmLW f inner join Policy p on f.PolicyKey = p.PolicyKey inner join Account a on a.AccountID=a.AccountID inner join AccountAddress aa on a.AccountKey=aa.AccountKey inner join Address ad on ad.AddressKey=aa.AddressKey inner join State s on ad.StateCode=s.StateCode inner join PolicyTransaction pt on pt.PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey and pt.AccountKey=a.AccountKey where p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and a.AccountKey=#AccountKey# group by f.ContactPerson,p.PolicyKey,ad.Address1,a.AccountName,ad.Zip,ad.Address2,a.AccountKey,p.AccountID,ad.City,s.StateDesc,f.QuoteExpiryDate,pt.PolicyExpirationDate

select ProducerId, ProducerCode, LogoImagePath, SPContactName, SPContactAddress, SPWebsite, SPCompanyName, SPPhoneNumber, CallImagePath, SPConatctEmailId, IsActive, ProducerName, NewCommission, RenewalCommission, State, StreetAddress, SPZip, SPCity, Producer_email, Date_added, SendQuoteLetter, SendRenewalSolicitation, Archive, SubProducerAccess, Signature, Fax, IndicationAccess, BillingContactName, BillingContactNumber, BillingContactEmail, SignatureText, CreditcardAccess, EmailSignature, SignatureText2, CompleteAddress, SignatureText3, IsDriect from SubProducer where ProducerCode = #ProducerCode#
sqlMap.update: update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select adds.AddressKey,adds.Address1,adds.Address2,adds.StateCode,adds.AddressTypeKey,adds.Street, adds.city as City, adds.CountyDesc as CountyDesc, (CASE WHEN adds.zip4 is not null THEN adds.zip+'-'+adds.zip4 ELSE adds.zip END) as Zip, adds.WorkPhone, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, (select IsBusinessActiveLW from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IsBusinessActiveLW, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, pt.ProducerCode,pt.ProducerCode as SubProducerID ,pt.StatusKey from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence =#TransactionSequence#
select StateCode,CountryKey,StateDesc,IsBusinessActive,IsBusinessActiveLW,IssueMailLwy,IssueMailAcc,IsStateReferred,ShowCityDropDown,IsStateReferredFQ from state order by statedesc;
select ClaimsMadeYearDesc from quote where IsFirstQuote ='Y' and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateDeductible) as DeductibleAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) +' / ' +dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as LimitAmount,pc.AggregateLimit,pc.OccuranceLimit,pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(CAST(pt.TotalPremium AS INT)) as TotalPremium,CAST(q.TotalPremiumFirstRange AS INT) as PremiumRange, dbo.getAmountFormat(q.TotalPremiumFirstRange)+' - '+dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremiumFirstRange,pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(CAST(pt.InvoicedPremium AS INT)) as InvoicedPremium,dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.ManualPremium) as ManualPremium, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible,pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, (CASE pc.IsClaimExpensesType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Defense Expenses Paid In Addition' ELSE 'Defense Expenses Paid Inside' END) as IsClaimExpensesType,(CASE pc.IsClaimOptionType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) as IsClaimOptionType, (CASE pc.IsDollarDefense WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Manual' ELSE 'Auto' END) as IsDollarDefenseText, pc.IsDollarDefense as IsDollarDefense, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, rt.RatingTraceSequence, q.IsMinimumPremium from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set IsLoginMailSent='Y', IsMailSent='Y',LastUpdateUserID =#LastUpdateUserID#,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select AccountKey, AccountID, AccountName, Website, AccountEmail, AccountVersion, LoginID, secondaryEmail, substring(AccountName,1,10) as ContextAccountName from Account where AccountKey = #AccountKey#

select Fax,CompleteAddress,ProducerName, Producer_email,NewCommission,RenewalCommission,SendQuoteLetter,SendRenewalSolicitation,StreetAddress,SPCity,State,SPZip,Archive,Date_added,SubProducerAccess,Signature,SPContactName,SPWebsite,SPPhoneNumber,SignatureText,IsDriect from SubProducer where ProducerCode IN (select ProducerCode from policyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#)
sqlMap.update: update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.StateCode as initialStateCode from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as ContextPremium from quote q, policytransaction pt where q.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised ='Y' and q.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#
select StatusKey from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AreaOfPracticeLW(AOPKey,PercentageValue,AOPCommentDesc,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,LastUpdateUserID,LastUpdateTimeStamp,VersionKey,CreatedDate,CreatedBy)select AOPKey,PercentageValue,AOPCommentDesc,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,#LastUpdateUserID#,#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,#VersionKey#,#CreatedDate#,#CreatedBy# from AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW where Policykey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsFirmReferred = null where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

update ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW set FirmYear=NULL,LastUpdateUserID =#LastUpdateUserID#,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select top 1 adds.AddressKey,adds.Address1,adds.Address2,adds.StateCode,adds.AddressTypeKey,adds.Street, adds.city as City, adds.CountyDesc as CountyDesc,adds.otherPhone, (CASE WHEN adds.zip4 is not null THEN adds.zip+'-'+adds.zip4 ELSE adds.zip END) as Zip,adds.WorkPhone,adds.otherPhone,(select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, (select IsBusinessActiveLW from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IsBusinessActiveLW, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, pt.ProducerCode,pt.ProducerCode as SubProducerID ,pt.StatusKey from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence =#TransactionSequence#

select adds.AddressKey,adds.Address1,adds.Address2,adds.StateCode,adds.AddressTypeKey,adds.Street, adds.city as CityText, adds.CountyDesc as CountyText,adds.cityKey as CitySelect, (CASE WHEN adds.zip4 is not null THEN adds.zip+'-'+adds.zip4 ELSE adds.zip END) as Zip, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, (CASE p.PolicyStatusKey WHEN '2' THEN CASE isNull(pt.ProducerCode,'') WHEN '' THEN s.StatusDesc + '(R)' ELSE s.StatusDesc + '(R) (P)' END ELSE CASE isNull(pt.ProducerCode,'') WHEN '' THEN s.StatusDesc ELSE s.StatusDesc + '(P)' END END) as headerStatusDesc, (select IsBusinessActiveLW from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IsBusinessActiveLW, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, pt.ProducerCode,pt.StatusKey from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt,Policy p,Status s, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and p.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey=pt.StatusKey and pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsRenewalReview=#IsRenewalReview# ,RenewalReviewComments=#RenewalReviewComments# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
sqlMap.select: select p.PolicyNumber, (CASE p.IsFullQuote WHEN 'Y' THEN 'FQ' ELSE 'QQ' END) as Quote_Type, pt.StatusKey, pt.StatusKey as StatusKey_Prev from PolicyTransaction pt, Policy p where p.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence=#TransactionSequence#

select (CASE WHEN AcceptanceDate IS NULL THEN #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ELSE AcceptanceDate END) as AcceptanceDate, (CASE WHEN QuoteEffectiveDate IS NULL THEN #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ELSE QuoteEffectiveDate END) as QuoteEffectiveDate, QuoteExpiryDate, IsRenewalReview, RenewalReviewComments From FirmLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, (select IsBusinessActive from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IsBusinessActive,(select IssueMailLwy from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IssueMailLwy, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.StateCode as initialStateCode from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select AccountKey, AccountID, AccountName, Website, AccountEmail, AccountVersion, LoginID, secondaryEmail, substring(AccountName,1,15) as ContextAccountName from Account where AccountKey = #AccountKey#

select dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as ContextPremium from quote q, policytransaction pt where q.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised ='Y' and q.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select adds.AddressKey,adds.Address1,adds.Address2,adds.StateCode,adds.AddressTypeKey,adds.Street, adds.city as City, adds.CountyDesc as CountyDesc, (CASE WHEN adds.zip4 is not null THEN adds.zip+'-'+adds.zip4 ELSE adds.zip END) as Zip, adds.WorkPhone, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, (select IsBusinessActiveLW from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IsBusinessActiveLW, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, pt.ProducerCode,pt.ProducerCode as SubProducerID ,pt.StatusKey from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence =#TransactionSequence#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select AccountKey, AccountID, AccountName, Website, AccountEmail, AccountVersion, LoginID, secondaryEmail, substring(AccountName,1,15) as ContextAccountName from Account where AccountKey = #AccountKey#

select top 1 PolicyKey,BankerName,RoutingNumber,AccountNumber,ChequeNumber,Amount,ContactPerson,ContactPhone,FinanceCompanyName,Detail,TransactionID,TransactionDate,TransactionStatus,PaymentMode,PaymentDetailId,FinanceInterval,FinanceDownPayment from PaymentDetail where Policykey=#PolicyKey# order by PaymentDetailId desc

select ProducerId, ProducerCode, LogoImagePath, SPContactName, SPContactAddress, SPWebsite, SPCompanyName, SPPhoneNumber, CallImagePath, SPConatctEmailId, IsActive, ProducerName, NewCommission, RenewalCommission, State, StreetAddress, SPZip, SPCity, Producer_email, Date_added, SendQuoteLetter, SendRenewalSolicitation, Archive, SubProducerAccess, Signature, Fax, IndicationAccess, BillingContactName, BillingContactNumber, BillingContactEmail, SignatureText, CreditcardAccess, EmailSignature, SignatureText2, CompleteAddress, SignatureText3, IsDriect from SubProducer where ProducerCode = #ProducerCode#

SELECT transactionsHandled12MonthsResi, transactionsHandled12MonthsComm, largestTransaction12MonthsResi, largestTransaction12MonthsComm, attendClosings, includeSecuringFinancing, useDisclosureForm FROM RealEastateDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
sqlMap.update: update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

sqlMap.update: update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, QuoteNumber = #QuoteNumber#, AccountID = #AccountID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select count(AOPKey) as aopCountQQ from AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and PercentageValue>0
select AggregateLimit,OccuranceLimit,LimitCode,CoverageKey from Limits where LimitSequence=#LimitSequence#
select AggregateDeductible, OccuranceDeductible, CoverageKey, DeductibleSequence from Deductibles where DeductibleSequence=#DeductibleSequence#
sqlMap.update: update Account set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, AccountID = #AccountID# where AccountKey=#AccountKey#
update Quote set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, QuoteEffectiveDate=#QuoteEffectiveDate#, QuoteExpiryDate=#QuoteExpiryDate# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#,IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance=#IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance#,ModifierComment = 'Claims Free Credit',hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported=#hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select count(AttorneyKey) as attorneyCountQQ from AttorneyDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsQuoteViewedByInsured='Y' where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
sqlMap.select: select AccountID, PolicyNumber, isUncompletedData, QuoteNumber, IsFullQuote, IsQuickQuote, MarketableProductKey, ReasonStatusComment, ReasonStatusTypeKey, PolicyStatusKey, InsuredUpdateTimeStamp, AppCreatedDate, RenewOfPolicyNumber from Policy where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#, VersionKey=#VersionKey# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsQuoteViewedByInsured=#IsQuoteViewedByInsured#,QQSource=#QQSource# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsQuickQuotePage='Y',MarketingId=#MarketingId# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
sqlMap.select: select distinct CountyDesc from CountyLW where CountyDesc like #CountyDesc# + '%' and StateCode=#StateCode# order by CountyDesc asc

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.Premium, pc.RetroActiveDate, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsDollarDefense, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey,pc.OccuranceLimit as ocLimit,pc.AggregateLimit as aggLimit,pc.AggregateDeductible as aggDeductible from PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l,Deductibles d where pc.CoverageSequence=#CoverageSequence# and l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pc.TransactionSequence =#TransactionSequence#
select CASE WHEN ClearStatus = 'C' THEN 'C' ELSE 'N' END as ClearStatusFlag from RulePolicyTransaction where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and isArchived='NO' and RuleId = 'NameClearance_Lawyers'

select adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.StateCode as initialStateCode from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select AccountKey, AccountID, AccountName, Website, AccountEmail, AccountVersion, LoginID, secondaryEmail, substring(AccountName,1,10) as ContextAccountName from Account where AccountKey = #AccountKey#
select isNameClearanceRequired from FirmLW where policykey=#PolicyKey#
select ProInsPremium,InsuranceCompanyNamePross,PriorActDatePross from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

SELECT top 1 cast(STUFF((SELECT ',' + CONVERT(varchar(10), AOPKey) FROM AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW WHERE PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and PercentageValue > 0 FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'' ) as varchar(8000)) AS AOP_values, CAST(STUFF((SELECT ',' + CONVERT(varchar(10), PercentageValue) FROM AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW WHERE PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and PercentageValue > 0 FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'' ) as varchar(8000)) AS aopPercentageValue, cast(STUFF((SELECT ',' + CONVERT(varchar(10), AOPKey) FROM AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW WHERE PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and PercentageValue > 0 FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'' ) as varchar(8000)) AS aopPercentageTRValue from AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and PercentageValue > 0
select AOPKey,AOPDescNew as AOPDesc from AOPLW where aopkey not in(3,5,35,8,62,20,27,24,17,18,23,7,40,19) order by AOPDesc

select adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as ContextPremium from quote q, policytransaction pt where q.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised ='Y' and q.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select SUBSTRING(AccountName,0,15) as AccountName_head from Account where AccountKey=#AccountKey#

select FormDataKey, PredecessorFirmName_1, PriorActsDate_1, PredecessorFirmName_2, PriorActsDate_2, PredecessorFirmName_3, PriorActsDate_3, IsPredecessorFormSelected, PersonOrEntity_1, PersonOrEntity_2, PersonOrEntity_3, IsSpecifiedAttorneySelected, IsSpecificProfServicesSelected, DisputeRenderedOnBehalfOf, ClaimRenderedOnBehalfOf, IsPreviouFirmFormSelected, PreviousFirmName, IsSuitForFeesAction, PreviousAttorneyName_1, PreviousAttorneyName_2, PreviousAttorneyName_3,IsCoverageExtensionsChanges,IsSpecifiedAttorneyCareerEndorsement,IsTitleAgencyEndorsement,IsProfessionalServicesExclusionEndorsement,SpecificProfessionalServices,TitleAgencyName from AdditionalFormDataLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select FormDataKey, PredecessorFirmName_1, PriorActsDate_1, PredecessorFirmName_2, PriorActsDate_2, PredecessorFirmName_3, PriorActsDate_3, IsPredecessorFormSelected, PersonOrEntity_1, PersonOrEntity_2, PersonOrEntity_3, IsSpecifiedAttorneySelected, IsSpecificProfServicesSelected, DisputeRenderedOnBehalfOf, ClaimRenderedOnBehalfOf, IsPreviouFirmFormSelected, PreviousFirmName, IsSuitForFeesAction, PreviousAttorneyName_1, PreviousAttorneyName_2, PreviousAttorneyName_3,IsCoverageExtensionsChanges from AdditionalFormDataLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select Fax,CompleteAddress,LogoImagePath,ProducerName, Producer_email,NewCommission,RenewalCommission,SendQuoteLetter,SendRenewalSolicitation,StreetAddress,SPCity,State,SPZip,Archive,Date_added,SubProducerAccess,Signature,SPContactName,SPWebsite,SPPhoneNumber,creditCardAccess,SignatureText,SubProducerPolicyIssuedAccess from SubProducer where ProducerCode IN (select ProducerCode from policyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#)

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateDeductible) as DeductibleAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) +'/' +dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as LimitAmount, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(q.TotalPremiumFirstRange)+'-'+dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremiumFirstRange, pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as InvoicedPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.ManualPremium) as ManualPremium, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) as AggregateLimitText, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as OccuranceLimitText, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsClaimOptionType, (CASE pc.IsDollarDefense WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Manual' ELSE 'Auto' END) as IsDollarDefenseText, pc.IsDollarDefense as IsDollarDefense, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, rt.RatingTraceSequence, rt.XmlOutputDatafromRating from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and q.TransactionSequence=#FinalisedQuote_TransactionSequence#

select adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.StateCode as initialStateCode from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select top 1 DocumentID, DocTitle, Comment, DocFileName, DocType, DocUrl, UploadedType, concat(convert(varchar(10),UploadedTime,101), ' ' + convert(varchar(10),UploadedTime,108)) as UploadedTime from DocumentArchiveLW where PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#)and DocType='pf' and doctitle like '%Policy form_%' order by DocumentID desc

sqlMap.select: select p.PolicyKey, pt.TransactionSequence, pt.TransactionSequence as FinalisedQuote_TransactionSequence, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey, adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, pt.StatusKey, p.PolicyStatusKey, pt.TransactionTypeKey, f.VersionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, p.AppCreatedDate,pt.ProducerCode,pt.ProducerCode as ProducerCodeInsured, pt.InvoicedPremium from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds, Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc, Quote q where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.MarketableProductKey=2 and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.PolicyKey = q.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and f.VersionSequence=(select max(VersionSequence) from FirmLW where policykey=p.PolicyKey) and p.isUncompletedData='N' and p.policykey=#PolicyKey#

sqlMap.select: select p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber,p.IsFullQuote,p.IsQuickQuote ,p.PolicyKey, p.isUncompletedData, p.PolicyEffectiveDate, a.AccountName, substring(a.AccountName,1,15) as ContextAccountName, a.AccountEmail, pt.TransactionSequence, pt.PolicyExpirationDate, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey, adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, adds.Address1 ,adds.WorkPhone, s.StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, p.PolicyStatusKey, pt.TransactionTypeKey, f.IsFirmPage, f.IsAOPPage, f.IsPracticePage, f.IsCoveragePage,f.IsCorporatePage, f.IsEnvironmentalPage, f.IsTaxPage,f.IsTitlePage, f.IsWillsEstatePage, f.IsPlaintiffPage,f.IsRealEstatePage,f.IsFinancialInsPage,f.IsRegistrationPage, f.FirstReviewUserID , f.VersionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as Premium, adds.CountyDesc, f.IsQuickQuoteMailSent,pt.ProducerCode,(select ProducerId from SubProducer where ProducerCode=pt.ProducerCode ) as ProducerId from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=(select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence=(select min(CoverageSequence)from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and p.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select adds.AddressKey,adds.Address1,adds.Address2,adds.StateCode,adds.AddressTypeKey,adds.Street, adds.city as CityText, adds.CountyDesc as CountyText,adds.cityKey as CitySelect, (CASE WHEN adds.zip4 is not null THEN adds.zip+'-'+adds.zip4 ELSE adds.zip END) as Zip,(select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, (CASE p.PolicyStatusKey WHEN '2' THEN CASE isNull(pt.ProducerCode,'') WHEN '' THEN s.StatusDesc + '(R)' ELSE s.StatusDesc + '(R) (P)' END ELSE CASE isNull(pt.ProducerCode,'') WHEN '' THEN s.StatusDesc ELSE s.StatusDesc + '(P)' END END) as headerStatusDesc,(select IsBusinessActiveLW from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IsBusinessActiveLW, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, pt.ProducerCode,pt.StatusKey from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt,Policy p,Status s, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and p.policykey=pt.policykey and pt.statuskey=s.statuskey and pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

sqlMap.select: select a.AccountName as nameAddressEndorsementAccountName,adds.Address1 as nameAddressEndorsementAddress1,adds.Address2 as nameAddressEndorsementAddress2,adds.StateCode,adds.city as nameAddressEndorsementCity, (CASE WHEN adds.zip4 is not null THEN adds.zip+'-'+adds.zip4 ELSE adds.zip END) as nameAddressEndorsementZipCode , (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateCode,pt.PolicyExpirationDate,pli.PriorActDatePross from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa ,ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW Pli,quote q where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pli.policykey=pt.policykey and q.policykey=pt.policykey and q.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pli.VersionSequence=pt.VersionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

sqlMap.select: Select count(*) as savedCount from AttorneyDetailsLW Where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
sqlMap.update: update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select pt.InvoicedPremium as OldInvoicedPremium,pt.TotalPremium as OldTotalPremium,pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount as OldTotalPolicyTaxAmount,q.TotalPremiumFirstRange as OldTotalPremiumFirstRange from PolicyTransaction pt inner join Quote q on pt.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence where q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and pt.policykey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

update PremiumCalculationBuffer set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#,PremiumVariation=#returnPremium#,TaxVariation=#returnTax# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: SELECT UnearnedPremium as endorsementPremium,UnearnedTax as endorsementTax,totalUnearnedPremium as endorsementTotalPremium FROM PremiumCalculationBuffer WHERE PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select TransactionSequence, TransactionEffectiveDate, TransactionTypeKey, PolicyExpirationDate, AccountKey, TransactionExpirationDate, ProducerCode, TotalPremium, StatusKey, TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, TotalPolicyTaxAmount, InvoicedPremium, SubInsuranceCarrier from PolicyTransaction where TransactionSequence=#TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select CoverageSequence, pc.TransactionSequence, MarketableProductKey, CoverageKey, Premium, RetroActiveDate, IsClaimOptionType, IsClaimExpensesType, SOISequence, AggregateLimit, OccuranceLimit, OccuranceDeductible, AggregateDeductible, TotalCovModifierPercentage, TotalCoverageTaxAmount, InitialCovPremium, Exposure, RiskState, RiskZip, ERPDate, Commission, AttachmentPoint, PrimaryAccess, ClassCode, IsDollarDefense, ManualPremium, IsManualPremium, QuoteEffectiveDate, QuoteExpiryDate, IsThisOptionFinalised, AcceptanceDate, IsQuoteSelected, IsFirstQuote, Comment, ClaimsMadeYearDesc, TotalPremiumFirstRange, IsMinimumPremium, QuoteDate, isShowQuote from PolicyCoverage pc inner join Quote q on q.PolicyKey=pc.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence=pc.TransactionSequence where q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and pc.policykey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update Email_Templates set RecordType='D' where EmailTemplateID=#EmailTemplateID#
sqlMap.select: select adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, (select IsBusinessActive from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IsBusinessActive,(select IssueMailAcc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IssueMailAcc, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.StateCode as initialStateCode from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select AccountKey, AccountID, AccountName, Website, AccountEmail, AccountVersion, LoginID, secondaryEmail, substring(AccountName,1,15) as ContextAccountName from Account where AccountKey = #AccountKey#

select dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as ContextPremium from quote q, policytransaction pt where q.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised ='Y' and q.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select count(PolicyKey) as isQuotelettersentcount from DocumentArchiveLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and DocType = 'QL' and DocFileName LIKE 'QuoteLetter%'
select IsIndicationMailSent from FirmLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
sqlMap.update: update Policytransaction set statuskey=5 where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update firmlw set lostworkqComment=#Comment#,isManualLostworkq='Y',LostWorkq_UpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#,LostWorkq_UpdatedTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount,l.LimitSequence from Limits l where CoverageKey=#CoverageKey# and l.AggregateLimit <= #AggregateLimit#
select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,d.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount,d.DeductibleSequence from Deductibles d where CoverageKey=#CoverageKey#

select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,d.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount,d.DeductibleSequence from Deductibles d where CoverageKey=#CoverageKey# and d.AggregateDeductible >=#AggregateDeductible#
select StatusKey, StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey in #StatusKeys# order by StatusDesc

select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount,l.LimitSequence from Limits l where CoverageKey=#CoverageKey#

select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount,l.LimitSequence from Limits l where CoverageKey=#CoverageKey# and LimitSequence between #LimitSequenceLower# and #LimitSequenceUpper#

select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount,l.LimitSequence from Limits l where CoverageKey=#CoverageKey# and l.AggregateLimit <= #AggregateLimit# and l.OccuranceLimit <= #OccuranceLimit#

select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount,l.LimitSequence from Limits l where CoverageKey=#CoverageKey#
select CountyKey,StateCode,CountyDesc from CountyLW where StateCode = #StateCode# order by CountyDesc asc
select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,d.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount,d.DeductibleSequence from Deductibles d where CoverageKey=#CoverageKey# and DeductibleSequence <24

select AgentEmail,AgentState,PassWord,UserNo,AgentName,LicenseNumber,IsActiveAgent,EligibleFirstReviewer,AliasEmail,ZohoUserID,IsActiveZohoUser from UserDetails where AgentEmail = 'kyle.nieman@amerinstpro.com'
select LicenseNumber from FirmLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey ,adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, pt.StatusKey, pt.TransactionTypeKey, pt.TransactionSequence, f.VersionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, p.MarketableProductKey, pc.CoverageKey from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.MarketableProductKey = 2 and pc.CoverageKey = 3 and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=(select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence=(select min(CoverageSequence)from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LicenseNumber= #LicenseNumber#,IsLicenseNumberUpdated=#IsLicenseNumberUpdated#,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select PolicyKey,TransactionSequence,BankerName,RoutingNumber,AccountNumber,ChequeNumber,Amount,ContactPerson,ContactPhone,FinanceCompanyName,Detail,TransactionID,TransactionDate,TransactionStatus,PaymentMode,PaymentDetailId,FinanceInterval,FinanceDownPayment,isManualPayment from PaymentDetail where PolicyKey= #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence,PolicyKey,AOPREKey,PercentageValue,AOPRECommentDesc,CommercialPercentageValue,AOPRECommCommentDesc from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW where policyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# order by AOPREKey
select AgentName, AgentEmail from UserDetails where UserNo = (select FirstReviewUserID from FIRMLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#)

select email_notification_id,event_name,description,subject,body,type,last_updated_by,last_updated_ts,subject_dynamicvalues,body_dynamicvalues,cc_role_desc,email_template,attachment_content from email_notifications_new where event_name=#mailSentBeyondWorkQCovrageDays#

select ReferralCountHistory,CASE When isPricingApproved is Null Then 'N' Else isPricingApproved END as isPricingApproved,QuoteComment from FirmLw where policykey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select ProInsPremium,InsuranceCompanyNamePross,PriorActDatePross,IsPriorActDateFull,FirmYear from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select count(rulestatus) as NewReferralCount from RulePolicyTransaction where rulestatus='NEW' and isArchived='NO' and PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select PolicyNumber as DBPolicyNumber,VersionKey from Policy with (nolock) where policykey=#PolicyKey#

select FORMAT(p.PolicyEffectiveDate, 'MM/dd/yyyy') as PolicyEffectiveDate,pt.TotalPremium,pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount,pt.InvoicedPremium,pc.IsManualPremium from policytransaction pt ,quote q,Policy p,PolicyCoverage pc where p.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pt.policykey=q.policykey and pt.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and q.TransactionSequence=pc.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select ProducerCode, TotalPremium from PolicyTransaction where policyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY q.PolicyKey ASC) AS ROWID, d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit, pc.CoverageSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pt.TotalPremium),1),2) as TotalPremium , pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount),1),2) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pt.InvoicedPremium),1),2) as InvoicedPremium , pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsDollarDefense, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, rt.XmlOutputDatafromRating, pc.IsManualPremium from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and rt.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and rt.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select count(PricingStatus) as PricingAICount from FirmLw where PricingStatus='AI' and PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and(isPricingApproved is NULL or isPricingApproved='N')

select distinct a.AccountID, a.AccountName, adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.StateCode as initialStateCode from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey=pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey=a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select CollectionsID,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,averageCases,consumerCollections,commercialollections,individualCollections,personnelToCollectDebts,servicesToPurchasers,claimsOrSuitsFDCPA,VersionKey,LawyersPerformCollectionWorkCount,YearsOfExperience,CommercialCollections,MortgageForeclosures,CasesHandledPast12Months,DollarValueForCasesHandled,MaximumValueForsingleCaseHandled,ServicesFordebtPurchasers,ServicesFordebtPurchasersDesc,AcceptCollectionCases,AcceptCollectionCasesDesc,DoesVerifyComplianceFDCPA,HasAllegedDebtVerified,HasAllegedDebtVerifiedDesc,HaveLettersAndCorrespondenceReviewed,HaveLettersAndCorrespondenceReviewedDesc,DoesUseFormalScript,DoesUseFormalScriptDesc,DoesPermitOutsideCollection,DoesPermitOutsideCollectionDesc,HasOwnershipInterest,HasOwnershipInterestDesc,HasAttorneysExecuted,HasAttorneysExecutedDesc from collectionsSuplimentDetailsLW Where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select AOLKey,AOLDesc,AOLDESCNew from AOLLW where AOLKEY in(14,15,4,6,5,8,9,11,13)
select CASE WHEN sum(PercentageValue) is not null THEN sum(PercentageValue) ELSE 0 END as percentageSum from AreaOfPracticeLW where Policykey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select email_notification_id, enn.event_name, description, from_role_desc, to_role_desc, subject, subject_dynamicvalues, body_dynamicvalues, cc_role_desc, email_template, attachment_content, EffectiveDate, IsCyber, IsSubProduced, Period, StateCode, EmailTemplateID, TemplateName, TemplateBody, TemplateStatus, TemplateCode, EmailType, TemplateCategory, AppType, EmailEventID, eel.event_name, eel.event_code, EmailDynamicID, DynamicContent_Name, DynamicContent_Code, DynamicContent_Body from EMAIL_NOTIFICATIONS_NEW enn, Email_Templates et, Email_Event_lku eel, Email_Dynamic_Content_lku edcl where enn.event_name = eel.event_code and enn.email_template= et.TemplateCode and enn.body_dynamicvalues= edcl.DynamicContent_Code and et.TemplateStatus = 'Active' and enn.event_name=#event_name# and et.AppType = 2
sqlMap.update: Update FirmLW set isAutoQuoteMailSent = 'Y', LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#, LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select top 1 CONVERT(varchar, TransactionEffectiveDate, 101) as cancelexpirydate from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and StatusKey=8 ORDER BY TransactionTypeKey DESC
select isRequotePolicy from firmlw where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
Select top 1 VersionSequence,VersionKey from Firmlw where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# order by VersionSequence DESC
SELECT CASE When count(*) is NULL THEN 0 ELSE count(*) END as isNotShowPremiumQuoteCount from Quote where Policykey=#PolicyKey# and isShowQuote='N'

SELECT DISTINCT ed.isFinancialEndirsement, ed.PremiumVariation, ed.TaxVariation, pt.TransactionTypeKey, p.PolicyStatusKey, pt.TransactionSequence, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, p.PolicyKey, pt.VersionSequence, p.PolicyEffectiveDate, p.PolicyNumber, ps.PolicyStatusDesc, pt.PolicyExpirationDate, pt.InvoicedPremium, pt.ProducerCode, a.AccountID, a.AccountName, a.AccountEmail, adds.Street, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.WorkPhone, adds.CountyDesc, st.StatusDesc, sc.StateDesc, fl.oldAccountId, spl.ProducerCode_McGowan, sp.NewCommission, sp.RenewalCommission, sp.IsDriect, pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount, tt.TransactionTypeDesc, fl.IssuedDate, fl.ContactPerson, ed.EndorsementIssuedDate FROM Account a INNER JOIN AccountAddress aa ON aa.AccountKey=a.AccountKey INNER JOIN Address adds ON adds.AddressKey=aa.AddressKey INNER JOIN Policy p ON p.AccountID=a.AccountID INNER JOIN FirmLW fl ON fl.PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey INNER JOIN PolicyTransaction pt ON pt.PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey AND pt.AccountKey=a.AccountKey INNER JOIN Quote q ON pt.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence LEFT JOIN SubProducer_lku spl ON spl.ProducerCode=pt.ProducerCode LEFT JOIN SubProducer sp ON sp.ProducerCode=pt.ProducerCode INNER JOIN Status st ON st.StatusKey = pt.StatusKey INNER JOIN State sc ON sc.StateCode = adds.StateCode INNER JOIN PolicyStatus ps ON ps.PolicyStatusKey = p.PolicyStatusKey INNER JOIN TransactionType tt ON tt.TransactionTypeKey = pt.TransactionTypeKey LEFT JOIN EndorsementDetails ed ON p.PolicyKey=ed.PolicyKey and ed.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence WHERE pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# AND pt.TransactionTypeKey > CASE WHEN ed.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence THEN 6 ELSE CASE WHEN q.IsThisOptionFinalised = 'Y' THEN 0 END END order by pt.TransactionSequence desc

select PolicyKey,TransactionSequence,TransactionEffectiveDate,TransactionTypeKey,PolicyExpirationDate,AccountKey,TransactionExpirationDate,ProducerCode,TotalPremium,StatusKey,TotalPolicyModifierPercentage,TotalPolicyTaxAmount,InvoicedPremium,SubInsuranceCarrier,VersionSequence,VersionKey from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence=#FinalisedQuote_TransactionSequence#

select ProducerCode, TotalPremium from PolicyTransaction where policyKey = #PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence = (select TransactionSequence from Quote where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and IsThisOptionFinalised = #IsThisOptionFinalisedQuote#)
select PolicyKey,VersionSequence,Year,PartTime,VersionKey from ClaimAgeLWEndorsement Where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence is NULL
sqlMap.update: update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select AttorneyName,AttorneyPriorActDate from CarrearCoverageAttorneyDetails where Policykey=#PolicyKey# and AttorneyPriorActDate is not null
select TotalPremium from PolicyTransaction with (nolock) where policykey=#PolicyKey#

select AttorneyKey,AttorneyName,LicensedStates,AnnualWorkedHours,NumberOfYearsInPractice,NumberOfYearsWithFirm,NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov,AttorneyPriorActDate,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,PriorActDate,AttorneyDesignation,DesignationId,IsNonRatedAttorney,PriorActDateAttorneysNew,isAttorneyEndorsed,VersionKey,JoiningDate,AttorneyRetroDate,RegNumber,DateAdmitted from AttorneyDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select pc.AggregateLimit,pc.OccuranceLimit,pc.AggregateDeductible,pc.OccuranceDeductible ,pc.CoverageSequence, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.PolicyKey, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsDollarDefense, pc.IsManualPremium from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and pc.PolicyKey =#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsOffRiskLetterUploaded = #IsOffRiskLetterUploaded# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select top 1 VersionSequence,DocumentID,DocTitle,Comment,DocFileName,PolicyKey,DocType,DocUrl,UploadedType,UploadedTime,VersionKey from DocumentArchiveLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and DocTitle like '%OffRisk%' order by DocumentID desc

f.IsEntertainmentPage, f.IsClientTerminated, f.FirstReviewUserID, f.VersionSequence, f.LicenseNumber, f.IsQuotePage, f.PolicyKey, f.YearOfFirmEstablished, f.IsFirmPracticeInOtherState, f.peopleToDisburseFunds, f.instructionsDocumentedReceivingParty, f.doucumentedProtocolsAndAuthority, f.secondayContactPerson, f.isQuoteByEmail, f.isNewApp, f.isAppCompleted, f.AnnualRevenueSequence, f.haveFraudSecurityAwarenessProgram, f.needCyberCoverage, f.completedPageCommemnt, f.NumberOfLawyers500, f.NumberOfLawyers1000, f.IsIndicationPage, f.IsFormDocumentSigned, f.SubProducerComment, f.IsThankYouEmailSend, f.QQRMLink, f.IsIndicationMailSent, f.ModifierChecking, f.FinalisedTransactionSequence, f.IsRuleExecuted, f.IsCantSeeQuote, f.IsAOPChange, f.IndicationSentDate, f.lostworkqComment, f.oldAccountId, f.RenewalSource, f.IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceCCB, f.isPolicyWentToUnderwriting, p.QuoteNumber, p.CompanyKey, p.MarketableProductKey, p.PolicyStatusKey, pt.InvoicedPremium from FirmLW f inner join Policy p on f.PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey inner join PolicyTransaction pt on p.PolicyKey= pt.PolicyKey inner join Quote q on p.PolicyKey= q.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence where q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and f.ipfsQuoteNumber=#financeAgreementQuoteNumber#
select dbo.DecryptString(#PolicyKey#) as decryptedPolicyKey,dbo.DecryptString(#requotePolicyEffectiveDate#) as decryptedEffectiveDate

select top 1 pt.TransactionSequence, d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateDeductible) as DeductibleAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) +'/' +dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as LimitAmount, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremium, pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as InvoicedPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.ManualPremium) as ManualPremium, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) as AggregateLimitText, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as OccuranceLimitText, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsClaimOptionType, (CASE pc.IsDollarDefense WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Manual' ELSE 'Auto' END) as IsDollarDefenseText, pc.IsDollarDefense as IsDollarDefense, pt.TransactionExpirationDate, pt.TransactionEffectiveDate, pt.PolicyExpirationDate from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# order by pt.TransactionSequence desc

select a.AccountName, a.AccountEmail, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.WorkPhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, pt.StatusKey, sts.StatusDesc, st.StateDesc from PolicyTransaction pt inner join Account a on a.AccountKey=pt.AccountKey inner join AccountAddress aa on aa.AccountKey=a.AccountKey inner join Address adds on adds.AddressKey=aa.AddressKey Left join State st on st.StateCode=adds.StateCode left join Status sts on sts.StatusKey=pt.StatusKey where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# group by a.AccountName, a.AccountEmail, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.WorkPhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone,pt.StatusKey, sts.StatusDesc, st.StateDesc

select distinct p.QuoteNumber, a.AccountName, pd.PolicyKey, pd.LastUpdateUserID, pd.TransactionSequence, pd.Detail, pd.Amount, pd.TransactionID, pd.TransactionDate, pd.TransactionStatus, pd.PaymentMode From PaymentDetail pd inner join Policy p on pd.PolicyKey = p.PolicyKey inner join Account a on p.AccountID=a.AccountID inner join PolicyTransaction pt on pt.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and pd.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey where pt.StatusKey = 7 and p.isUncompletedData='N' and p.MarketableProductKey=2 and pd.PaymentMode = 'ach' and pd.TransactionStatus = 'Pending' and pd.TransactionDate > #BackTransactionDate#

sqlMap.update: update FirmLW Set IsLicenseNumberUpdated='Y',LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence =#VersionSequence#

update PaymentDetail set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, TransactionID=#TransactionID#,TransactionStatus=#TransactionStatus#,TransactionDate=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,Amount=#Amount# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence=#TransactionSequence#
sqlMap.select: select p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber,p.IsFullQuote,p.IsQuickQuote ,p.PolicyKey,p.isUncompletedData ,p.PolicyEffectiveDate, a.AccountName, substring(a.AccountName,1,15) as ContextAccountName, a.AccountEmail, pt.TransactionSequence, pt.PolicyExpirationDate, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey, adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, adds.Address1 ,adds.WorkPhone, s.StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, p.PolicyStatusKey, pt.TransactionTypeKey, f.IsFirmPage, f.IsAopPage, f.IsPracticePage, f.IsCoveragePage, f.IsCorporatePage, f.IsEnvironmentalPage, f.IsFinancialInsPage, f.IsPlaintiffPage,f.IsRealEstatePage,f.IsTaxPage,f.IsTitlePage,f.IsWillsEstatePage, f.FirstReviewUserID , f.VersionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as Premium, adds.CountyDesc from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=(select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence=(select min(CoverageSequence)from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and a.LoginID= #AccountEmail#
select PolicyKey,VersionSequence,FLAOPKey,PercentageValue,FLAOPCommentDesc,VersionKey from FamilyLawDetailsLW where PolicyKey= #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select top 1 pt.TransactionSequence, d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateDeductible) as DeductibleAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) +'/' +dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as LimitAmount, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremium, pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as InvoicedPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.ManualPremium) as ManualPremium, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) as AggregateLimitText, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as OccuranceLimitText, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsClaimOptionType, (CASE pc.IsDollarDefense WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Manual' ELSE 'Auto' END) as IsDollarDefenseText, pc.IsDollarDefense as IsDollarDefense, pt.TransactionExpirationDate, pt.TransactionEffectiveDate, pt.PolicyExpirationDate from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionTypeKey= #TransactionTypeKey# order by pt.TransactionSequence desc

select ac.Website, ac.AccountEmail, ac.AccountName, adds.WorkExt, adds.WorkPhone, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.StateCode, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode=adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.City, adds.CountyDesc, adds.Zip , adds.Zip4, f.ContactPerson, f.ContactPhone, f.ContactPhoneExt, f.IsQuickQuoteByEmail, f.IsAnAgentCall, f.LicenseNumber, f.FirstReviewUserID as UserNo, convert(varchar(20),f.QuoteEffectiveDate,101) as QuoteEffectiveDate, convert(varchar(20),f.QuoteExpiryDate,101) as QuoteExpiryDate, f.IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns, f.IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance, p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber, convert(varchar(20),p.PolicyEffectiveDate,101) as PolicyEffectiveDate, convert(varchar, getdate(), 101) as CurrentDate,f.QuoteComment, f.ModifierComment, f.QuoteSentDate, f.IsTaxCalculation from Account ac, Address adds, Policy p, FirmLW f where ac.AccountKey=#AccountKey# and adds.AddressKey=#AddressKey# and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and f.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select CountyDesc from County where CountyDesc = #CountyDesc# and StateCode=#StateCode# order by CountyDesc asc
sqlMap.update: Update FirmLW set ZohoAccountID = #ZohoAccountID#, LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#, LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ZohoAccessToken FROM ZohoToken where MarketableProductKey = 2
sqlMap.update: update Address set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, WorkPhone = #WorkPhone# where AddressKey=#AddressKey#
sqlMap.select: SELECT distinct AgentName, ZohoUserID FROM UserDetails where IsActiveZohoUser = 'Y' ORDER BY AgentName
select ipfsQuoteNumber from FirmLW where ipfsQuoteNumber=#financeAgreementQuoteNumber#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set isPricingApproved=#isPricingApproved=#,FollowUnderwriterFlow=#FollowUnderwriterFlow#,isRatingsChnaged=#isRatingsChnaged#,isComingFromUWFlow=#isComingFromUWFlow#,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# ,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select PolicyKey,VersionSequence,otherServices,otherServicesDesc,VersionKey from CopyRightTrademarkDetailsLW where policyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
sqlMap.delete: delete from RuleComment where RulePolicyId in (select RulePolicyId from RulePolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#)
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#, IsFirmReferred=#IsFirmReferred# where VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select AttorneyName, AnnualHours, AttorneyPriorActDate from EstimateFormAttorneyDetails EFAD inner join EstimateFormGeneralInfo EF on EFAD.FormKey = EF.FormKey where EF.FormKey = #FormKey#
select AOLKey,AOLDesc,AOLDESCNew from AOLLW

select top 1 ac.Website, ac.AccountEmail, ac.AccountName, adds.WorkExt, adds.WorkPhone, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.StateCode,(select StateDesc from State where StateCode=adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.City, adds.CountyDesc, adds.Zip , adds.Zip4, f.ContactPerson, f.ContactPhone, f.ContactPhoneExt, f.IsQuickQuoteByEmail, f.IsAnAgentCall, f.LicenseNumber, f.FirstReviewUserID as UserNo, convert(varchar(20),f.QuoteEffectiveDate,101) as QuoteEffectiveDate, convert(varchar(20),f.QuoteExpiryDate,101) as QuoteExpiryDate, f.IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns, f.IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance, p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber, convert(varchar(20),p.PolicyEffectiveDate,101) as PolicyEffectiveDate, convert(varchar(20),pt.PolicyExpirationDate,101) as PolicyExpirationDate,convert(varchar, getdate(), 101) as CurrentDate,f.QuoteComment, f.ModifierComment, f.QuoteSentDate, f.IsTaxCalculation from Account ac, Address adds, Policy p, FirmLW f,PolicyTransaction pt where ac.AccountKey=#AccountKey# and adds.AddressKey=#AddressKey# and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and f.PolicyKey = p.policykey and p.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey order by f.VersionSequence desc
sqlMap.update: update PolicyCoverage set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsClaimExpensesType=#IsClaimExpensesType# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence=#TransactionSequence#
sqlMap.select: select q.IsMinimumPremium, d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateDeductible) as DeductibleAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) +'/' +dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as LimitAmount, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(q.TotalPremiumFirstRange)+'-'+dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremiumFirstRange, pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as InvoicedPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.ManualPremium) as ManualPremium, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, (CASE pc.IsClaimExpensesType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) as IsClaimExpensesType, (CASE pc.IsClaimOptionType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) as IsClaimOptionType, (CASE pc.IsDollarDefense WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Manual' ELSE 'Auto' END) as IsDollarDefenseText, pc.IsDollarDefense as IsDollarDefense, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, rt.RatingTraceSequence,dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) as AggregateLimit,dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as OccuranceLimit, f.IsFirmReferred from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt, FirmLW f where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = f.PolicyKey and q.IsQuoteSelected='Y' and pc.PolicyKey =#PolicyKey#
select FormID,FormName,FormDesc,EffectiveDate,ExpirationDate,FormFooter,FormSequence,FormType,StateCode,CompanyKey from FormLW order by FormSequence
select Top 1 TotalCovModifierPercentage as PreviousModifier from PolicyCoverage where Policykey=#PolicyKey#
select MAX(PolicyKey) as MaxPolicyKey From policy where accountid in (select accountid from policy where policykey=#PolicyKey#) and isUncompletedData != 'Y' and MarketableProductKey = 2
sqlMap.update: Update ZohoToken set ZohoAccessToken = #isZohoAccessToken#, LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where MarketableProductKey = 2
sqlMap.select: select top 1 a.AccountName as AccountName_admin, fl.ContactPerson as ContactPerson_admin, fl.FirstReviewUserID as FirstReviewerId_admin, a.secondaryEmail as secondaryEmail, pt.producercode as ProducerCode_admin, a.AccountEmail as AccountEmail_admin, ad.StateCode, pt.StatusKey, ad.Zip, ad.Zip4,ad.Address1 as Address1_admin, ad.Address2 as Address2_admin, ad.City, ad.CountyDesc, ad.WorkPhone as WorkPhone_admin, p.PolicyEffectiveDate, p.QuoteNumber, pt.PolicyExpirationDate as PolicyExpirationDate_admin ,pld.PriorActDatePross as PriorActDatePross_admin, pld.InsuranceCompanyNamePross as InsuranceCompanyNamePross_admin,ProInsPremium as ProInsPremium_admin from Policy p inner Join FirmLW fl on p.PolicyKey=fl.PolicyKey and p.VersionKey=fl.VersionKey inner Join PolicyTransaction pt on p.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and p.VersionKey=pt.VersionKey inner join Account a on pt.AccountKey=a.AccountKey inner Join AccountAddress aad on a.AccountKey = aad.AccountKey inner Join Address ad on aad.AddressKey = ad.AddressKey left join ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW pld on p.PolicyKey = pld.PolicyKey and p.VersionKey = pld.VersionKey where p.QuoteNumber = #quoteNumber_admin#

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence from PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l,Deductibles d where pc.CoverageSequence=#CoverageSequence# and l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pc.TransactionSequence =#TransactionSequence#
sqlMap.update: update PolicyTransaction set LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, StatusKey=#StatusKey#,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select AttorneyKey,AttorneyName,LicensedStates,AnnualWorkedHours,NumberOfYearsInPractice,NumberOfYearsWithFirm,NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov,AttorneyPriorActDate,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,PriorActDate,AttorneyDesignation,DesignationId,IsNonRatedAttorney,PriorActDateAttorneysNew,isAttorneyEndorsed,VersionKey,JoiningDate,AttorneyRetroDate,RegNumber,DateAdmitted from AttorneyDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# order by AttorneyKey

select Count(pc.IsManualPremium) as IsManualPremium from PolicyCoverage pc,Quote q,PolicyTransaction pt where pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.IsManualPremium='Y' and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and pc.PolicyKey= #PolicyKey#

select FormDataKey,PolicyKey,PredecessorFirmName_1,PriorActsDate_1,PredecessorFirmName_2,PriorActsDate_2,PredecessorFirmName_3,PriorActsDate_3,IsPredecessorFormSelected,PersonOrEntity_1,PersonOrEntity_2,PersonOrEntity_3,IsSpecifiedAttorneySelected,IsSpecificProfServicesSelected,DisputeRenderedOnBehalfOf,ClaimRenderedOnBehalfOf,IsPreviouFirmFormSelected,PreviousFirmName,IsSuitForFeesAction,PreviousAttorneyName_1,PreviousAttorneyName_2,PreviousAttorneyName_3,IsCoverageExtensionsChanges,IsSpecifiedAttorneyCareerEndorsement,IsTitleAgencyEndorsement,IsProfessionalServicesExclusionEndorsement,SpecificProfessionalServices,TitleAgencyName from AdditionalFormDataLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
