select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateDeductible) as DeductibleAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) +'/' +dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as LimitAmount, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(q.TotalPremiumFirstRange)+'-'+dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremiumFirstRange, pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as InvoicedPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.ManualPremium) as ManualPremium, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) as AggregateLimitText, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as OccuranceLimitText, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsClaimOptionType, (CASE pc.IsDollarDefense WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Manual' ELSE 'Auto' END) as IsDollarDefenseText, pc.IsDollarDefense as IsDollarDefense, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, rt.RatingTraceSequence, rt.XmlOutputDatafromRating from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and q.TransactionSequence=#FinalisedQuote_TransactionSequence#

SELECT PolicyKey,PolicyEffectiveDate,AccountID,PolicyNumber,isUncompletedData,QuoteNumber,IsFullQuote,IsQuickQuote,MarketableProductKey,ReasonStatusComment,ReasonStatusTypeKey,PolicyStatusKey,InsuredUpdateTimeStamp,AppCreatedDate,RenewOfPolicyNumber,QuoteType,TransactionCount,VersionKey,FormId,FormVersionKey,CompanyKey FROM Policy WHERE AccountID = #AccountID#

select pt.TransactionSequence, d.DeductibleSequence, l.LimitSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsDollarDefense from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=#PreviousfinilazedTransactionSequence# and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select top 1 IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns, IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance from FirmLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select top 1 p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber,p.VersionKey, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey ,adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, pt.StatusKey, pt.TransactionSequence, f.VersionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, p.MarketableProductKey, pc.CoverageKey from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.MarketableProductKey = 2 and pc.CoverageKey = 3 and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=(select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence=(select min(CoverageSequence)from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# order by f.VersionSequence desc

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, pc.AggregateDeductible as DeductibleAmount, cast(pc.AggregateLimit as varchar(50)) +'/'+ cast(pc.OccuranceLimit as varchar(50)) as LimitAmount, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.AggregateLimit, pc.OccuranceLimit, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsDollarDefense, pc.IsManualPremium, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, rt.RatingTraceSequence, f.VersionSequence from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt, FirmLW f where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = f.PolicyKey and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select isAppCompleted from firmlw where policykey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update PolicyCoverage set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsDollarDefense=#IsDollarDefense# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence=#TransactionSequence#
sqlMap.select: select top 1 ce.ID,ce.PolicyKey,ce.CancellationReasonID,ce.CancellationTypeID,ce.TransactionSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as InvoicedPremium, p.PolicyEffectiveDate, pt.TransactionExpirationDate,pt.TransactionEffectiveDate,pt.PolicyExpirationDate from Policy p, PolicyTransaction pt, CancellationEndorsement ce where p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = ce.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence = ce.TransactionSequence and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionTypeKey=7 order by ce.LastUpdateTimeStamp desc

select top 1 p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey, adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, pt.StatusKey, pt.TransactionTypeKey, pt.TransactionSequence, f.VersionSequence, p.MarketableProductKey from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.MarketableProductKey = 2 and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionTypeKey=#TransactionTypeKey# order by f.VersionSequence desc

select BankruptcyDetailsID,personalBankrupties,commercialBankruptcies,representedDebtors,preBankruptcyServices,dueDiligenceProcess,reviewProcedureForCertification,disclosureStatementExplaining,conspicuousStatement,policyKey,VersionSequence,VersionKey,CountOfLawyersForBankruptcy,AverageYearsOfBankruptcyExperience,DebtorRepresentation,CreditorRepresentation,AsTrustee,BankruptcyOther,BankruptcyOtherDesc,HasProceduresToCertifyAccuracy,ProceduresToCertifyAccuracyDesc,HasRepresentedDebtors,HasRepresentedTotalDebtors,HasRepresentedDebtorsDesc,companyFinance from BankruptcyDetailsLW where policyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select top 1 pt.AccountKey, adds.AddressKey from PolicyTransaction pt, Address adds, AccountAddress aa, Policy p where aa.AccountKey = pt.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and p.MarketableProductKey = 2 and pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select PolicyEffectiveDate, QuoteType, PolicyStatusKey,QuoteNumber,c.Description as CompanyName from Policy p inner join Company c on p.CompanyKey = c.CompanyKey where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select count(*) as ClearSubjectiveCount from RulePolicyTransaction where isArchived='NO' and clearstatus in('CS') and PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select ProducerId,ProducerCode,LogoImagePath,SPContactName,SPContactAddress,SPWebsite,SPCompanyName,SPPhoneNumber,CallImagePath,SPConatctEmailId,IsActive,ProducerName,NewCommission,RenewalCommission,State,StreetAddress,SPZip,SPCity,Producer_email,Date_added,SendQuoteLetter,SendRenewalSolicitation,Archive,SubProducerAccess,Signature,Fax,IndicationAccess,BillingContactName,BillingContactNumber,BillingContactEmail,SignatureText,CreditcardAccess,EmailSignature,SignatureText2,CompleteAddress,SignatureText3,IsDriect from SubProducer where ProducerCode=#ProducerCode#

select VersionSequence,PolicyKey,NumberOfAttorneyInPlantiffWork,PercentOfAttorneyTimeDevToPlantiff,NumberOfSuppotedStaffToPlantiff,NumberOfInjuryCasesIn12Month,NumberOfInjuryHandleByAttorney,IsApplAdvertiseByTelevision,IsApplAdvertiseByRadio,IsApplAdvertiseByNewspaper,IsApplAdvertiseByYellowpages,IsRefAggrementReferToAppl,IsRefAggrementReferToApplRefersOut,IsAppAcceptRefersFromOtherFirms,IsSettlementAggrementsUsed,IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLim,PerOfCasesBeforeTrail,PerOfCasesTriedToConclusion,PerOfCasesReferToApplicant,IsAppConfirmCarryProfLiabIns,IsApplAdvertiseByMagazine,IsApplAdvertiseByInternet,PerOfCasesSettledBeforeTrail,IsAppReferToOtherLawFirms,IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLimDesc,massTortOrClassAction from PlantiffSuppLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select pt.ProducerCode, d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2)+'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.Premium, pc.RetroActiveDate, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsDollarDefense, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey,pc.OccuranceLimit as ocLimit,pc.AggregateLimit as aggLimit,pc.AggregateDeductible as aggDeductible, pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage from PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l, Deductibles d, PolicyTransaction pt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pc.TransactionSequence =pt.TransactionSequence
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, ModifierComment=#ModifierComment# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select FormID,StateCode,FormName,FormDesc,EffectiveDate,ExpirationDate,FormFooter,FormType,FormSequence from StateFormLW where StateCode = #StateCode# order by FormSequence
sqlMap.update: Update FirmLW set NameClearType=#NameClearType#, NameClearDate=#NameClearDate#, isNameClearanceRequired=#isNameClearanceRequired#, LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#, LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DATEDIFF(day, #CancellationEffectiveDate#, #PolicyEffectiveDate#) AS Days

select PolicyKey,convert(varchar,PolicyEffectiveDate,101) as PolicyEffectiveDate,AccountID,PolicyNumber,isUncompletedData,QuoteNumber,IsFullQuote,IsQuickQuote,MarketableProductKey,ReasonStatusComment,ReasonStatusTypeKey,PolicyStatusKey,InsuredUpdateTimeStamp,convert(varchar,AppCreatedDate,101) as AppCreatedDate,RenewOfPolicyNumber,QuoteType,TransactionCount,VersionKey,FormId,FormVersionKey,CompanyKey from Policy where Policykey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#, FirstReviewUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
sqlMap.select: select PolicyKey,Year,PartTime,AttorneyKey from ClaimAgeLW where PolicyKey=93284 order by AttorneyKey

select Top 1 FormKey,AccountName,ContactPerson,Address1,StateCode,CountyDesc,City,Zip,WorkPhone,AccountEmail,AggregateLimit,OccuranceLimit,OccuranceDeductible,AggregateDeductible,IsClaimOptionType, IsClaimExpensesType,IsDollarDefense,InsuranceCompanyNamePross,convert(varchar(10), PolicyExpirationDatePross,101)as PolicyExpirationDatePross,ProInsPremium,IsPriorActDateFull,Case WHEN hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported='Y'Then 'YES' else 'NO' END as hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported,FirmYear,PriorActDatePross from EstimateFormGeneralInfo where AccountName=#AccountName# and ContactPerson=#ContactPerson# and Address1=#Address1# and StateCode=#StateCode# and WorkPhone=#WorkPhone# and AccountEmail=#AccountEmail# and PolicyExpirationDatePross=#PolicyExpirationDatePross# and IsPriorActDateFull=#IsPriorActDateFull# and hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported=#hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported# group by FormKey,AccountName,ContactPerson,Address1,StateCode,CountyDesc,City,Zip,WorkPhone,AccountEmail,AggregateLimit,OccuranceLimit,OccuranceDeductible,AggregateDeductible,IsClaimOptionType, IsClaimExpensesType,IsDollarDefense,InsuranceCompanyNamePross, PolicyExpirationDatePross,ProInsPremium,IsPriorActDateFull,hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported,FirmYear,PriorActDatePross order by FormKey DESC

select pt.TransactionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.MarketableProductKey = 2 and pc.CoverageKey = 3 and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=(select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence=(select min(CoverageSequence)from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select AOPKey,PercentageValue from AreaOfPracticeLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select ProducerCode from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select AttorneyKey,AttorneyName,LicensedStates,AnnualWorkedHours,NumberOfYearsInPractice,NumberOfYearsWithFirm,NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov,AttorneyPriorActDate,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,PriorActDate,AttorneyDesignation,DesignationId,IsNonRatedAttorney,PriorActDateAttorneysNew,isAttorneyEndorsed,VersionKey,JoiningDate,AttorneyRetroDate,RegNumber,DateAdmitted from AttorneyDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and isnull(IsNonRatedAttorney,'') != 'Y'
sqlMap.update: Update FirmLW set ZohoPotentialsID = #ZohoPotentialsID#, LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#, LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select count(clearstatus) as AICount from RulePolicyTransaction where clearstatus='AI' and PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and isArchived='NO'
select AppCreatedDate from policy where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select ProducerCode from SubProducer_lku where ProducerCompanyName = #ProducerCompanyName#

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateDeductible) as DeductibleAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) +'/' +dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as LimitAmount, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(q.TotalPremiumFirstRange)+'-'+dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremiumFirstRange, pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as InvoicedPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.ManualPremium) as ManualPremium, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, (CASE pc.IsClaimExpensesType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) as IsClaimExpensesType, (CASE pc.IsClaimExpensesType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Outside' ELSE 'Inside' END) as ClaimExpensesTypeText,(CASE pc.IsClaimOptionType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Aggregate' ELSE 'Each Claim' END) as IsClaimOptionType, (CASE pc.IsDollarDefense WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Manual' ELSE 'Auto' END) as IsDollarDefenseText, pc.IsDollarDefense as IsDollarDefense, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt ,TransactionType tt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and tt.TransactionTypeKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and q.IsFirstQuote='Y' and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and q.isShowQuote='Y'
select AggregateLimit,OccuranceLimit,OccuranceDeductible,AggregateDeductible from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence =#TransactionSequenceZoho#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, NumberOfLawyers=#NumberOfLawyers#, NumberOfLawyers500=#NumberOfLawyers500#, NumberOfLawyers1000=#NumberOfLawyers1000# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

update ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, InsuranceCompanyNamePross=#InsuranceCompanyNamePross#, ProInsPremium=#ProInsPremium#, DeductibleSequencePross=#DeductibleSequencePross#, LimitSequencePross=#LimitSequencePross# where Policykey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select distinct p.PolicyKey, a.AccountKey, adds.AddressKey from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.MarketableProductKey=2 and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.StatusKey=11 and p.IsFullQuote='N' and p.IsQuickQuote='Y' and p.PolicyStatusKey=1 and p.PolicyKey != #PolicyKey# and (a.AccountName = #AccountName# or a.AccountEmail=#AccountEmail# or adds.WorkPhone=#WorkPhone#)

select FormID,StateCode,FormName,FormDesc,EffectiveDate,ExpirationDate,FormFooter,FormType,FormSequence,CompanyKey from StateFormLW where StateCode=#StateCode# and EffectiveDate = (select max(EffectiveDate) from StateFormLW where StateCode=#StateCode# and EffectiveDate <= #PolicyEffectiveDate#) order by FormSequence

select FormID,FormName,FormDesc,EffectiveDate,ExpirationDate,FormFooter,FormSequence,FormType,StateCode,CompanyKey from FormLW where EffectiveDate = (select max(EffectiveDate) from FormLW where EffectiveDate <= #PolicyEffectiveDate#) order by FormSequence
sqlMap.delete: delete from ClaimAgeLWEndorsement Where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence is NULL
sqlMap.select: select top 1 StatusDesc,pt.StatusKey from PolicyTransaction pt, Status s where pt.statuskey=s.statuskey and pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select CollectionsID,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,averageCases,consumerCollections,commercialollections,individualCollections,personnelToCollectDebts,servicesToPurchasers,claimsOrSuitsFDCPA,VersionKey,LawyersPerformCollectionWorkCount,YearsOfExperience,CommercialCollections,MortgageForeclosures,CasesHandledPast12Months,DollarValueForCasesHandled,MaximumValueForsingleCaseHandled,ServicesFordebtPurchasers,ServicesFordebtPurchasersDesc,AcceptCollectionCases,AcceptCollectionCasesDesc,DoesVerifyComplianceFDCPA,HasAllegedDebtVerified,HasAllegedDebtVerifiedDesc,HaveLettersAndCorrespondenceReviewed,HaveLettersAndCorrespondenceReviewedDesc,DoesUseFormalScript,DoesUseFormalScriptDesc,DoesPermitOutsideCollection,DoesPermitOutsideCollectionDesc,HasOwnershipInterest,HasOwnershipInterestDesc,HasAttorneysExecuted,HasAttorneysExecutedDesc from collectionsSuplimentDetailsLW where policyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select distinct p.QuoteNumber, a.AccountName, pd.PolicyKey, pd.LastUpdateUserID, pd.TransactionSequence, pd.Detail, pd.Amount, pd.TransactionID, pd.TransactionDate, pd.TransactionStatus, pd.PaymentMode From PaymentDetail pd inner join Policy p on pd.PolicyKey = p.PolicyKey inner join Account a on p.AccountID=a.AccountID inner join PolicyTransaction pt on pt.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and pd.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey where pt.StatusKey = 7 and p.isUncompletedData='N' and p.MarketableProductKey=2 and pd.PaymentMode = 'ach' and pd.TransactionStatus = 'Manual'
select AccountKey, AccountID, AccountName, Website, AccountEmail, AccountVersion, LoginID, secondaryEmail from Account where AccountKey =#AccountKey#
select DeductibleSequence from Deductibles where CoverageKey=3 and AggregateDeductible=#AggregateDeductible#

select ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY PolicyKey ASC) AS ROWID,FormID,StateCode,PolicyKey,FormName,FormDesc,FormFooter,FormType,FormSequence from PolicyFormLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# order by FormSequence
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set isMailSentBeyondWorkQCovrageDaysFlag = 'Y' where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
update FirmLW Set LicenseNumber=#LicenseNumber#,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select p.PolicyKey, p.PolicyEffectiveDate, adds.StateCode, l.LimitSequence, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.IsClaimExpensesType as IsClaimExpensesTypeOld, pc.IsDollarDefense as IsDollarDefenseOld from Policy p, Account a, Address adds, AccountAddress aa, PolicyTransaction pt, PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l where p.AccountID=a.AccountID and a.AccountKey=aa.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and p.MarketableProductKey=2 and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update PaymentDetail set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, TransactionID=#TransactionID#,TransactionStatus=#TransactionStatus#, Amount=#Amount#,Detail=#Detail#,PaymentMode=#PaymentMode#,TransactionDate=#TransactionDate# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select count(*) as totalReferralTrigered from rulepolicytransaction where policykey=#PolicyKey# and isArchived='NO'
sqlMap.update: update RulePolicyTransaction set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, clearstatus='C' where Policykey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select bankruptcyKey,Debtor,Creditor,Trustee,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,VersionKey from BankruptcyCasesDetailsLW where policyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and bankruptcyKey = #bankruptcyCasesKey#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, QuoteComment=#QuoteComment# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select PolicyKey,Year,PartTime,AttorneyKey from ClaimAgeLW where policykey = #PolicyKey# order by AttorneyKey

select IsThisOptionFinalised, TotalPremiumFirstRange, TotalPremium, InvoicedPremium from Quote q , PolicyTransaction pt where q.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised = 'Y' and q.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select TaxAOPKey,TaxAopDesc,revenuePercentage,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,TaxCommentDesc,VersionKey from TaxSuppDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# order by TaxAOPKey
select AgentEmail,AgentState,PassWord,UserNo,AgentName,LicenseNumber,IsActiveAgent,EligibleFirstReviewer,AliasEmail from UserDetails where AgentEmail = #agentemaillicense#

select ProducerCompanyName, spl.ProducerCode from SubProducer_lku spl inner join SubProducer sp on spl.ProducerCode = sp.ProducerCode where sp.IsDriect != 'Y' AND spl.ProducerCode IN (select ProducerCode from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#)
select TaxAOPKey,TaxAopDesc,revenuePercentage,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,TaxCommentDesc,VersionKey from TaxSuppDetailsLW where policykey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select pc.AggregateLimit,pc.OccuranceLimit,pc.AggregateDeductible,pc.OccuranceDeductible ,pc.CoverageSequence, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.PolicyKey, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsDollarDefense, pc.IsManualPremium from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey =#PolicyKey#

select AddressKey, Address1, Address2, City, StateCode, AddressTypeKey, Zip, Zip4, HomePhone, WorkPhone, WorkExt, MobilePhone, CountyDesc, CountryDesc, Street, otherPhone, countyKey, cityKey from Address where addresskey = (select AddressKey from AccountAddress where AccountKey In (select AccountKey from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#))
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW Set QuoteEffectiveDate=#QuoteEffectiveDate#, QuoteExpiryDate=#QuoteExpiryDate#, QuoteComment=#QuoteComment#, LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# ,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
update SmartSearchValue set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, Percentage=#percentage# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and AOPKey=#AOPkey#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ModifierKey,Percentage FROM IndicationModifiers where Policykey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: Update FirmLW set ISZohoInsert = #ISZohoInsert#, LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#, LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select OldInvoicedPremium as Premium, TotalUnearnedPremium as ProrataPremium, ProRatePremium, TotalUnearnedPremium, PreviousfinilazedTransactionSequence,PremiumVariation,TaxVariation from PremiumCalculationBuffer where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, ipfsQuoteNumber=#ipfsQuoteNumber# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select Fax,LogoImagePath,ProducerName,ProducerCode, Producer_email,NewCommission,RenewalCommission,SendQuoteLetter,SendRenewalSolicitation,StreetAddress,SPCity,State,SPZip,Archive,Date_added,SubProducerAccess,Signature,SPContactName,SPWebsite,SPWebsite as SPWebsite1,SPPhoneNumber,SignatureText,SignatureText3,EmailSignature,SignatureText2,SignatureText3,IsDriect from SubProducer where ProducerCode IN (select ProducerCode from policyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#)
sqlMap.delete: delete from DocumentArchiveLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and DocType='INJ'
sqlMap.select: select AOPDescNew, PercentageValue from EstimateFormAOPDetails_LW EFAP inner join EstimateFormGeneralInfo EF on EFAP.FormKey = EF.FormKey inner join AOPLW apl on EFAP.AOPKey = apl.AOPKey where EF.FormKey = #FormKey# and PercentageValue > 0

select top 1 transactionsHandled12MonthsResi,transactionsHandled12MonthsComm,largestTransaction12MonthsResi,largestTransaction12MonthsComm,attendClosings,includeSecuringFinancing,useDisclosureForm,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,VersionKey,RealEstateKey,RealEstNumberOfLawyers,RealEstAvgExperience,RealEstFormationInvolvement,RealEstFormationInvolvementDesc,RealEstLimitPart,RealEstSyndications,RealEstInvestmentTrusts,RealEstBusinessRel,RealEstBusinessRelDesc,RealEstPercentLegalFees,RealEstPercentLegalFeesDesc from RealEastateDetailsLW where policyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set ipfsQuoteNumber=#ipfsQuoteNumber#, LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#, LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select PolicyEffectiveDate,p.AccountID,PolicyNumber,isUncompletedData,QuoteNumber,IsFullQuote,IsQuickQuote,AppCreatedDate,RenewOfPolicyNumber,QuoteType,PolicyExpirationDate,ProducerCode,TotalPremium,StatusKey,a.AccountEmail,a.AccountName,a.AccountName as Firm_Name,Address1,Address2,City,StateCode,Zip,Zip4,HomePhone,WorkPhone,WorkExt,CountyDesc,Street,otherPhone ,dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateDeductible) AS DeductibleAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) +'/' +dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) AS LimitAmount,(case when Address1 is null then Street else Address1 end+', '+(case when Address2 is null then '' else Address2 end)+', '+City+', '+StateCode+', '+(case when Zip4 is null then Zip else Zip+'-'+Zip4 end)) as Address from Policy p inner join PolicyTransaction pt on p.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey inner join AccountAddress aa on aa.AccountKey=pt.AccountKey inner join Address adds on adds.AddressKey=aa.AddressKey inner join Account a on a.AccountKey=aa.AccountKey inner join PolicyCoverage pc on p.PolicyKey=pc.PolicyKey inner join Quote q on pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence where p.Policykey=#PolicyKey# and q.TransactionSequence=(select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where Policykey=p.Policykey)
sqlMap.update: update PolicyCoverage set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, AggregateLimit=#AggregateLimit#, OccuranceLimit=#OccuranceLimit#, AggregateDeductible=#AggregateDeductible#, OccuranceDeductible=#OccuranceDeductible# where CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, isPricingApproved='Y' where policykey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select AOPKey,PercentageValue,AOPCommentDesc,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,VersionKey,AreaOfPracticeKey,AreaOfPracticeCode from AreaOfPracticeLW where PolicyKey= #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and PercentageValue > 0 order by AOPKey

SELECT CoverageSequence,PolicyKey,TransactionSequence,MarketableProductKey,CoverageKey,Premium,RetroActiveDate,IsClaimOptionType,IsClaimExpensesType,SOISequence,AggregateLimit,OccuranceLimit,OccuranceDeductible,AggregateDeductible,TotalCovModifierPercentage,TotalCoverageTaxAmount,InitialCovPremium,Exposure,RiskState,RiskZip,ERPDate,Commission,AttachmentPoint,PrimaryAccess,ClassCode,IsDollarDefense,ManualPremium,IsManualPremium FROM PolicyCoverage WHERE POLICYKEY = #PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence = (select TransactionSequence from Quote where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and IsThisOptionFinalised = #IsThisOptionFinalisedQuote#)

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateDeductible) as DeductibleAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) +'/' +dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as LimitAmount, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(q.TotalPremiumFirstRange)+'-'+dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremiumFirstRange, pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as InvoicedPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.ManualPremium) as ManualPremium, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, (CASE pc.IsClaimExpensesType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) as IsClaimExpensesType, (CASE pc.IsClaimExpensesType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Outside' ELSE 'Inside' END) as ClaimExpensesTypeText, (CASE pc.IsClaimOptionType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Aggregate' ELSE 'Each Claim' END) as IsClaimOptionType, (CASE pc.IsDollarDefense WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) as IsDollarDefenseText,(CASE pc.IsManualPremium WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Manual' ELSE 'Auto' END) as IsManualPremiumText, pc.IsDollarDefense as IsDollarDefense, pc.IsManualPremium as IsManualPremium, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, rt.RatingTraceSequence from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and q.IsQuoteSelected='Y' and q.isShowQuote='Y'

select email_notification_id,event_name,description,subject,body,type,last_updated_by,last_updated_ts,subject_dynamicvalues,body_dynamicvalues,cc_role_desc,email_template,attachment_content from email_notifications_new where event_name=#mailSentAfterPayment#
select count(*) as noClearedReferralCount from RulePolicyTransaction where policykey=#PolicyKey# and isArchived='NO' and clearstatus is NULL
select AmountRangeKey,NumberOfMattersValued from WillsStateTrustValuesAmountsLW where Policykey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber,p.IsFullQuote,p.IsQuickQuote ,p.PolicyKey,p.isUncompletedData ,p.PolicyEffectiveDate, a.AccountName, substring(a.AccountName,1,15) as ContextAccountName, a.AccountEmail, pt.TransactionSequence, pt.PolicyExpirationDate, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey, adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, adds.Address1 ,adds.WorkPhone, s.StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, p.PolicyStatusKey, pt.TransactionTypeKey, f.IsBasicPage, f.IsGeneralPage, f.IsSupplementPage, f.IsAttesationPage, f.IsComputerServicePage, f.IsBusinessFundPage, f.IsPracriceMangPage, f.IsQuickQuotePage, f.FirstReviewUserID , f.VersionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as Premium, adds.CountyDesc, f.ContactPerson from Policy p, Account a, Firm f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=(select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence=(select min(CoverageSequence)from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and a.LoginID = #AccountEmail# and f.IsRegistrationPage='Y'
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsCantSeeQuote = #IsCantSeeQuote#, LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update Account set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, AccountName = #AccountName#, AccountEmail = #AccountEmail# where AccountKey=#AccountKey#
sqlMap.select: select GAOPID,providingBondWork,eminentDomainServices,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,VersionKey from GovernmentSupplementDetailsLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select ZohoPotentialsID, ISZohoInsert, ZohoAccountID,NumberOfLawyers,NumberOfLawyers1000,NumberOfLawyers500,IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance from FirmLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select top 1 p.PolicyKey,AgentEmail,UserNo,AgentName,AliasEmail,FirstReviewUserID from UserDetails ud inner join Firmlw flw on ud.UserNo = flw.FirstReviewUserID inner join Policy p on flw.PolicyKey = p.PolicyKey where p.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select count(PolicyKey) as IndicationVersion from DocumentArchiveLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and DocType = 'INJ'
sqlMap.update: update PolicyCoverage set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsClaimExpensesType=#IsClaimExpensesType#,IsDollarDefense=#IsDollarDefense# Where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence=#TransactionSequence#
sqlMap.select: select AgentEmail,AgentState,PassWord,UserNo,AgentName,LicenseNumber,IsActiveAgent,EligibleFirstReviewer,AliasEmail from UserDetails where UserNo=#AgentNo#

select top 1 ac.Website, ac.AccountEmail, ac.AccountName, adds.WorkExt, adds.WorkPhone, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.StateCode,(select StateDesc from State where StateCode=adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.City, adds.CountyDesc, adds.Zip , adds.Zip4, f.ContactPerson,f.ContactPhone, f.ContactPhoneExt, f.IsQuickQuoteByEmail, f.IsAnAgentCall, f.LicenseNumber, f.FirstReviewUserID as UserNo, convert(varchar(20),f.QuoteEffectiveDate,101) as QuoteEffectiveDate, convert(varchar(20),f.QuoteExpiryDate,101) as QuoteExpiryDate, f.IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns,f.IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance, p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber, convert(varchar(20),p.PolicyEffectiveDate,101) as PolicyEffectiveDate, convert(varchar, getdate(), 101) as CurrentDate,f.QuoteComment, f.ModifierComment, f.QuoteSentDate, f.IsTaxCalculation, convert(varchar(20),pt.PolicyExpirationDate,101) as PolicyExpirationDate,p.VersionKey from Account ac, Address adds, Policy p,PolicyTransaction pt, FirmLW f where ac.AccountKey=#AccountKey# and adds.AddressKey=#AddressKey# and p.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and f.policykey=p.PolicyKey and f.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# order by f.VersionSequence desc
sqlMap.update: update Address set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, StateCode=#StateCode#, WorkPhone=#WorkPhone#, CountyDesc=#CountyDesc#, City=#City#, Street=#Street#, Zip=#Zip#, Zip4=#Zip4# where AddressKey = #AddressKey#
sqlMap.select: select CASE WHEN ClearStatus = 'C' THEN 'C' ELSE 'N' END as ClearStatusFlag from RulePolicyTransaction where PolicyKey = #ZohoNameClearancePolicyKey# and isArchived='NO' and RuleId = 'NameClearance_Lawyers'
select AccountKey, AccountID, AccountName, Website, AccountEmail, AccountVersion, LoginID, secondaryEmail from Account where AccountKey =#AccountKey#

Select LimitAmount,DeductibleAmount,PolicyExpirationDatePross,ProInsPremium,IsClaimExpLiability,PriorActDatePross,IsPerClaim,VersionSequence,IsPriorActDateFull,FirmYear,InsuranceCompanyNamePross,LimitSequencePross,PolicyKey,DeductibleSequencePross,IsProfDefenceExpense,VersionKey from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW Where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=(Select max(versionsequence) from FirmLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#)

select distinct p.QuoteNumber, a.AccountName, pd.PolicyKey, pd.LastUpdateUserID, pd.TransactionSequence, pd.Detail, pd.Amount, pd.TransactionID, pd.TransactionDate, pd.TransactionStatus, pd.PaymentMode From PaymentDetail pd inner join Policy p on pd.PolicyKey = p.PolicyKey inner join Account a on p.AccountID=a.AccountID inner join PolicyTransaction pt on pt.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and pd.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey where pt.StatusKey = 7 and p.isUncompletedData='N' and p.MarketableProductKey=2 and pd.PaymentMode = 'ach' and pd.TransactionStatus = 'Pending' and pd.TransactionDate < #BackTransactionDate#
sqlMap.update: Update Policy set isUncompletedData='Y' Where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select pt.TransactionSequence, d.DeductibleSequence, l.LimitSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsDollarDefense from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
Select AccountKey, AccountID, AccountName, Website, AccountEmail, AccountVersion, LoginID, secondaryEmail from Account where AccountKey=#AccountKey#
select ProducerCode from SubProducer

select top 1 a.AccountName as AccountName_admin, fl.ContactPerson as ContactPerson_admin, fl.FirstReviewUserID as FirstReviewerId_admin, a.secondaryEmail as secondaryEmail, pt.producercode as ProducerCode_admin, a.AccountEmail as AccountEmail_admin, ad.StateCode, pt.StatusKey, ad.Zip, ad.Zip4,ad.Address1 as Address1_admin, ad.Address2 as Address2_admin, ad.City, ad.CountyDesc, ad.WorkPhone as WorkPhone_admin, p.PolicyEffectiveDate, p.QuoteNumber, pt.PolicyExpirationDate as PolicyExpirationDate_admin ,pld.PriorActDatePross as PriorActDatePross_admin, pld.InsuranceCompanyNamePross as InsuranceCompanyNamePross_admin,ProInsPremium as ProInsPremium_admin from Policy p inner Join Firm fl on p.PolicyKey=fl.PolicyKey and p.VersionKey=fl.VersionKey inner Join PolicyTransaction pt on p.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and p.VersionKey=pt.VersionKey inner join Account a on pt.AccountKey=a.AccountKey inner Join AccountAddress aad on a.AccountKey = aad.AccountKey inner Join Address ad on aad.AddressKey = ad.AddressKey left join ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetail pld on p.PolicyKey = pld.PolicyKey and p.VersionKey = pld.VersionKey where p.QuoteNumber = #quoteNumber_admin#
select case when count(*) is not null then count(*) else 0 End as referralCounts from RulePolicyTransaction where Policykey = #PolicyKey# and isArchived='NO'
sqlMap.update: update PolicyTransaction set StatusKey=2,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# ,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select a.AOPDesc, ap.AOPKey,ap.PercentageValue,ap.AOPCommentDesc,ap.PolicyKey,ap.VersionSequence,ap.VersionKey,ap.AreaOfPracticeKey,ap.AreaOfPracticeCode from AreaOfPracticeLW ap, AOPLW a where ap.AOPKey=a.AOPKey and ap.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select Top 1 AgentEmail,UserNo,AgentName,AliasEmail from UserDetails where AgentName = #agentname#

select p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey, adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, pt.StatusKey, pt.TransactionTypeKey, pt.TransactionSequence, f.VersionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, p.MarketableProductKey, pc.CoverageKey from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.MarketableProductKey = #MarketableProductKey# and pc.CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=(select max(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence=(select max(CoverageSequence)from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update Policy set LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, PolicyEffectiveDate = #PolicyEffectiveDate#,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: Select count(*) as addAttorneys from AttorneyDetailsLW Where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select max(EmailTemplateID) as EmailTemplateID from Email_Templates

SELECT InvoicedPremium,TotalPolicyTaxAmount,TotalPremium FROM PolicyTransaction pt Inner Join Quote q on pt.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence where pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y'

SELECT InvoicedPremium,TotalPolicyTaxAmount,TotalPremium FROM PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence=(select max(PreviousFinalizedTransactionSequence) as PreviousFinalizedTransactionSequence from endorsementdetails where Policykey=#PolicyKey#)
sqlMap.update: update PolicyCoverage set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsClaimExpensesType=#IsClaimExpensesType# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select top 1 ProducerCode from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select LastUpdateUserID from Account where AccountKey = #AccountKey#

select PolicyKey,TransactionSequence,BankerName,RoutingNumber,AccountNumber,ChequeNumber,Amount,ContactPerson,ContactPhone,FinanceCompanyName,Detail,TransactionID,TransactionDate,TransactionStatus,PaymentMode,PaymentDetailId,FinanceInterval,FinanceDownPayment,isManualPayment from PaymentDetail with (nolock) where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence=#FinalisedQuote_TransactionSequence#

select top 1 ce.ID,ce.PolicyKey,ce.CancellationReasonID,ce.CancellationTypeID,ce.TransactionSequence, pt.InvoicedPremium, p.PolicyEffectiveDate, pt.TransactionExpirationDate,pt.TransactionEffectiveDate from Policy p, PolicyTransaction pt, CancellationEndorsement ce where p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = ce.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence = ce.TransactionSequence and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionTypeKey=7 order by ce.LastUpdateTimeStamp desc

select a.FLAopDesc, ap.PolicyKey,ap.VersionSequence,ap.FLAOPKey,ap.PercentageValue,ap.FLAOPCommentDesc,ap.VersionKey from FamilyLawDetailsLW ap, FamilyLawLW a where ap.FLAOPKey=a.FLAOPKey and ap.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and ap.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select ProducerCompanyName from SubProducer_lku where ProducerCode IN (select ProducerCode from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#)

select adds.*, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, (select IsBusinessActiveLW from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IsBusinessActiveLW, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, pt.ProducerCode,pt.StatusKey from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select WESKey,CheckedValue,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,WESCommentDesc,PercentageValue,VersionKey from WillsEstateServicesLW where policykey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select email_notification_id, enn.event_name, description, from_role_desc, to_role_desc, subject, subject_dynamicvalues, body_dynamicvalues, cc_role_desc, email_template, attachment_content, EffectiveDate, IsCyber, IsSubProduced, Period, StateCode, EmailTemplateID, TemplateName, TemplateBody, TemplateStatus, TemplateCode, EmailType, TemplateCategory, AppType, EmailEventID, eel.event_name, eel.event_code, EmailDynamicID, DynamicContent_Name, DynamicContent_Code, DynamicContent_Body from EMAIL_NOTIFICATIONS_NEW enn, Email_Templates et, Email_Event_lku eel, Email_Dynamic_Content_lku edcl where enn.event_name = eel.event_code and enn.attachment_content= et.TemplateCode and enn.body_dynamicvalues= edcl.DynamicContent_Code and et.TemplateStatus = 'Active' and enn.event_name=#event_name# and et.AppType = 2

select l.LimitSequence,pc.CoverageSequence,pc.PolicyKey,pc.TransactionSequence,pc.MarketableProductKey,pc.CoverageKey,pc.Premium,pc.RetroActiveDate,pc.IsClaimOptionType,pc.IsClaimExpensesType,pc.SOISequence,pc.AggregateLimit,pc.OccuranceLimit,pc.OccuranceDeductible,pc.AggregateDeductible,pc.TotalCovModifierPercentage,pc.TotalCoverageTaxAmount,pc.InitialCovPremium,pc.Exposure,pc.RiskState,pc.RiskZip,pc.ERPDate,pc.Commission,pc.AttachmentPoint,pc.PrimaryAccess,pc.ClassCode,pc.IsDollarDefense,pc.ManualPremium,pc.IsManualPremium from limits l inner join PolicyCoverage pc on pc.AggregateLimit=l.AggregateLimit and pc.OccuranceLimit=l.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey=pc.CoverageKey inner join quote q on q.PolicyKey=pc.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence=pc.TransactionSequence where pc.CoverageKey=3 and pc.PolicyKey= #PolicyKey# and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y'

select top 5 p.PolicyKey,p.AppcreatedDate,f.AcceptanceDate,a.AccountName,pt.ProducerCode,pt.AccountKey,aa.AddressKey,f.VersionSequence,a.AccountID,p.PolicyStatusKey,p.QuoteNumber from Policy p inner join PolicyTransaction pt on pt.PolicyKey=p.Policykey inner join Account a on pt.AccountKey=a.AccountKey inner join AccountAddress aa on aa.AccountKey=a.AccountKey inner join Firmlw f on f.PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey where p.MarketableProductKey=2 and p.AppCreatedDate > '2021-05-02'and p.AppCreatedDate < '2021-07-29' and pt.ProducerCode is null and pt.Statuskey in(7,6) group by p.PolicyKey,p.AppcreatedDate,f.AcceptanceDate,a.AccountName,pt.ProducerCode,pt.AccountKey,aa.AddressKey,f.VersionSequence,a.AccountID ,p.PolicyStatusKey,p.QuoteNumber

select VersionSequence,PolicyKey,NumberOfEstateOver1Million,NumberOfEstateOver5Million,NumberOfEstateOver10Million,IsAttorneyServeAsExecutorTrustee,IsApplProvideInvestAdviceToClient,IsMemCertLegalSpecialist,IsApplPolicyReviewBySecondAttorney,IsApplTaxInConjucWithTrustWork,IsApplEmployAccountants,IsApplEmployTaxAttorney,IsFirmNotRequireTaxAdvice,IsApplObtainCertificate,ListOfAttWithNameServicesClient,IsApplHaveControlOverFunds,IsCounterSignatureRequired,IsApplAuthorizeToWithdrawFromBank,IsApplCarryEmployeeDishonestyCoverage,inPurchaseSaleSecurities,willEstatesHandledPastYear from WillsTrustsEstateSuppLW where VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select WESKey,CheckedValue,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,WESCommentDesc,PercentageValue from WillsEstateServicesLW where VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select PolicyKey, CONVERT(varchar, PolicyEffectiveDate, 101) as PolicyEffectiveDate, AccountID, PolicyNumber, isUncompletedData, QuoteNumber, IsFullQuote, IsQuickQuote, MarketableProductKey, ReasonStatusComment, ReasonStatusTypeKey, PolicyStatusKey, InsuredUpdateTimeStamp, AppCreatedDate, RenewOfPolicyNumber from policy where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select PolicyKey,VersionSequence,otherServices,otherServicesDesc from CopyRightTrademarkDetailsLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select GrossRevenueKey,YearEndDate,Amount,PolicyKey,VersionSequence from GrossRevenueForFirmLW where policykey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and GrossRevenueKey=1

select l.LimitSequence,pc.CoverageSequence,pc.PolicyKey,pc.TransactionSequence,pc.MarketableProductKey,pc.CoverageKey,pc.Premium,pc.RetroActiveDate,pc.IsClaimOptionType,pc.IsClaimExpensesType,pc.SOISequence,pc.AggregateLimit,pc.OccuranceLimit,pc.OccuranceDeductible,pc.AggregateDeductible,pc.TotalCovModifierPercentage,pc.TotalCoverageTaxAmount,pc.InitialCovPremium,pc.Exposure,pc.RiskState,pc.RiskZip,pc.ERPDate,pc.Commission,pc.AttachmentPoint,pc.PrimaryAccess,pc.ClassCode,pc.IsDollarDefense,pc.ManualPremium,pc.IsManualPremium from limits l inner join PolicyCoverage pc on pc.AggregateLimit=l.AggregateLimit and pc.OccuranceLimit=l.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey=pc.CoverageKey inner join quote q on q.PolicyKey=pc.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence=pc.TransactionSequence where pc.CoverageKey=3 and pc.PolicyKey= #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence,PolicyKey,s1.AOPREKey,PercentageValue,AOPRECommentDesc,CommercialPercentageValue,AOPRECommCommentDesc from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW s1, AOPRELW s2 where s1.AOPREKey=s2.AOPREKey and s2.AOPREType='C' and s1.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select ContactPerson,ContactPhone,IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns,IsPolicyExcludesCoverage,IsQuickQuoteByEmail,IsAnAgentCall,ContactPhoneExt,IsBasicPage,IsGeneralPage,IsEntertainmentPage,IsClientTerminated,FirstReviewUserID,VersionSequence,LicenseNumber,IsQuotePage,PolicyKey,YearOfFirmEstablished,IsFirmPracticeInOtherState,IsFirmHaveClientInEntertainmentInd,IsFirmInvolvedInClassActionCase,IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToSecurity,IsFirmHaveClientMoreThan25PercentOfBilling,PercentFromFirstLargestRevenueClient,PercentFromSecondLargestRevenueClient,ServicesRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient,ServicesRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient,IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance,PolicyExcludeCoverageForAffiliatesDesc,IsFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirms,IsFirmHaveEquityIntGrtThan10,IsFirmPersServedAsOfficerInJointVenture,IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices,ApplicantProvidesLegalServicesDesc,IsAttorneyNotCoveredByProfLiability,IsAppOfficeSharedWithAttorney,TotalNumOfNonAttorneyStaff,IsFirmHaveIndepDockets,IsFirmRequireEngagementLetter,IsNonEngagementLetterIssueToFirm,IsPolicyProhibitAttorneyWithInvestment,IsEmplRelativeToConfInfomation,PercentofApplAcctRcbl,IsApplInitiatedLawsuitForFirm,IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability,AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates,AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons,IsIndependentContractor,IsFirmHaveBackupAttorney,PerOfGrossBillingsUnderContract,BackupAttorneyName,BackupAttorneyAddress,BackupAttorneyPhoneNumber,IsFirmHaveProcForFormersClients,IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl,IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest,IsAnyActOmmBecomeClaimAgntFirm,ApplicantName,IsApplRestWithManagement,ApplRestWithManagementDesc,PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate,PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails,IsTaxPage,IsEnvironmentalPage,IsSecuritiesPage,IsTitlePage,IsWillsEstatePage,IsPlaintiffPage,IsRealEstatePage,IsFinancialInsPage,IsIntellectPropPage,IsCorporatePage,IsFirmMergedWithOtherFirm,IsAopPage,IsPracticePage,IsCoveragePage,IsFirmPage,IsApplIntToFinanAssests,IsPolicyIncludeLateralHireCov,IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvestment,IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToMoney,IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceToInvClient,BackupAttorneyAddress2,CommentsByInsured,CommentsByAgent,IsLoginMailSent,IsMailSent,IsRegistrationPage,IsRetreivalMailSent,NumberOfLawyers,IsQuickQuotePage,IsClaimInLastFiveYears,QuoteEffectiveDate,QuoteExpiryDate,IsReceiveNewsLetter,IsFirmReferred,Comment,ModifierComment,IsQuoteViewedByInsured,AcceptanceDate,QuoteSentDate,IsViewed,IsTaxCalculation,QuoteComment,IsQuickQuoteMailSent,IsLicenseNumberUpdated,IssuedDate,IsRealEstateCommercialPage,IsRealEstateResidentialPage,IsApplFirmWithDifferentLegalName,ApplLegalNameAddressDesc,IsFirmEquityInterestInTitleInsurance,IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceDesc,IsFirmProvidedLegalService,IsFirmProvideInvestmentAdvice,ClientNameFirstLargestRevenueClient,ClientNameSecondLargestRevenueClient,DateRenderedFirstLargestRevenueClient,DateRenderedSecondLargestRevenueClient,IsRenewed,IsComingFromSubProducer,MarketingId,IsAttorneyAddedDeleted,IsRenewFirmPage,Is9010Policy,GrossFeesPaidRenew,IsRenewalReview,RenewalReviewComments,IsSpecialIssuance,SpecialIssuanceComments,ipfsQuoteNumber,IsOffRiskLetterUploaded,isPricingApproved,isComingFromUWFlow,FollowUnderwriterFlow,isRatingsChnaged,ReferralCountHistory,withdrawOrDisengaged,actAgentForPublicFigures,provideProfessionalContract,provideMoneyManagementServices,custodyOrControlFunds,securityAwareness,isFirmCoverageForPreceedorFirmsDescription,disbursementTransaction,peopleToDisburseFunds,instructionsDocumentedReceivingParty,doucumentedProtocolsAndAuthority,secondayContactPerson,isQuoteByEmail,isNewApp,isAppCompleted,AnnualRevenueSequence,FirmInvestmentAdviceDesc,isServedAsCEOChairmanPresident,isPolicyExcludeCoverage,isPolicyExcludeCoverageDescription,UnderwriterComment,PricingStatus,isCyberCoverageRequired,haveFraudSecurityAwarenessProgram,needCyberCoverage,completedPageCommemnt,NumberOfLawyers500,NumberOfLawyers1000,IsIndicationPage,IsFormDocumentSigned,IsThankYouEmailSend,QQRMLink,IsIndicationMailSent,ModifierChecking,FinalisedTransactionSequence,IsRuleExecuted,IsCantSeeQuote,IndicationSentDate,IsAOPChange,IsFirmProvidedLegalServiceCCB,((select count(*) from AttorneyDetailsLW where Policykey=f.PolicyKey)+TotalNumOfNonAttorneyStaff) as TotalStaff,(select (case when higherLimit is not null then lowerLimit+'-'+higherLimit else lowerLimit end) as RevenueDesc from AnnualRevenueLimits where coveragekey=3 and RevenueKey=f.AnnualRevenueSequence) as FirmRevenue from FirmLW f where f.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and f.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select PolicyKey,VersionSequence,FLAOPKey,PercentageValue,FLAOPCommentDesc from FamilyLawDetailsLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select AggregateLimit as CurrentLimit,OccuranceLimit as RequestedLimit from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW pli, Limits l where l.LimitSequence = pli.LimitSequencePross and pli.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select email_notification_id,event_name,description,subject,body,type,last_updated_by,last_updated_ts,subject_dynamicvalues,body_dynamicvalues,cc_role_desc,email_template,attachment_content from email_notifications_new where event_name=#event_name#
select top 1 RulePolicyId,isArchived,RuleStatus from RulePolicyTransaction where ruleid='ValidateModifiersRange_Lawyers' and PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# order by RulePolicyId Desc

select LimitAmount,DeductibleAmount,PolicyExpirationDatePross,ProInsPremium,IsClaimExpLiability,PriorActDatePross,IsPerClaim,VersionSequence,IsPriorActDateFull,FirmYear,InsuranceCompanyNamePross,LimitSequencePross,PolicyKey,DeductibleSequencePross,IsProfDefenceExpense from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select l.LimitSequence,pc.CoverageSequence,pc.PolicyKey,pc.TransactionSequence,pc.MarketableProductKey,pc.CoverageKey,pc.Premium,pc.RetroActiveDate,pc.IsClaimOptionType,pc.IsClaimExpensesType,pc.SOISequence,pc.AggregateLimit,pc.OccuranceLimit,pc.OccuranceDeductible,pc.AggregateDeductible,pc.TotalCovModifierPercentage,pc.TotalCoverageTaxAmount,pc.InitialCovPremium,pc.Exposure,pc.RiskState,pc.RiskZip,pc.ERPDate,pc.Commission,pc.AttachmentPoint,pc.PrimaryAccess,pc.ClassCode,pc.IsDollarDefense,pc.ManualPremium,pc.IsManualPremium from limits l inner join PolicyCoverage pc on pc.AggregateLimit=l.AggregateLimit and pc.OccuranceLimit=l.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey=pc.CoverageKey inner join quote q on q.PolicyKey=pc.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence=pc.TransactionSequence where pc.CoverageKey=3 and pc.PolicyKey= #PolicyKey# and q.IsFirstQuote='Y'

select VersionSequence,PolicyKey,NumberOfAttorneyInPlantiffWork,PercentOfAttorneyTimeDevToPlantiff,NumberOfSuppotedStaffToPlantiff,NumberOfInjuryCasesIn12Month,NumberOfInjuryHandleByAttorney,IsApplAdvertiseByTelevision,IsApplAdvertiseByRadio,IsApplAdvertiseByNewspaper,IsApplAdvertiseByYellowpages,IsRefAggrementReferToAppl,IsRefAggrementReferToApplRefersOut,IsAppAcceptRefersFromOtherFirms,IsSettlementAggrementsUsed,IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLim,PerOfCasesBeforeTrail,PerOfCasesTriedToConclusion,PerOfCasesReferToApplicant,IsAppConfirmCarryProfLiabIns,IsApplAdvertiseByMagazine,IsApplAdvertiseByInternet,PerOfCasesSettledBeforeTrail,IsAppReferToOtherLawFirms,IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLimDesc,massTortOrClassAction from PlantiffSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update policytransaction set statuskey=#StatusKey#,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select AOPKey,PercentageValue,AOPCommentDesc,PolicyKey,VersionSequence from AreaOfPracticeLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select VersionSequence,PolicyKey,AOPREKey,PercentageValue,AOPRECommentDesc,CommercialPercentageValue,AOPRECommCommentDesc from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select a.AOLDesc, al.AOLKey,al.VersionSequence,al.PolicyKey,al.PercentageOfRevenue,al.AverageCaseSize,al.LargestCaseSize,al.AOLCommentDesc,al.PercentageOfDefense,al.DefenseCommentDesc,al.VersionKey from AreaOfLitigationForFirmLW al, AOLLW a where al.AOLKey=a.AOLKey and al.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and al.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select FirminitLawsuitsKey,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,AmountOfFeesSued,DueDateFees,SuitFilesDateFees,IsFavOutInUnderMatter,IsAllegOfLegalMalPrac,FeesAreaOfPractice,FeeSuitDispositionKey from FirmInitLawsuitsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select PolicyKey,TransactionSequence,TransactionEffectiveDate,TransactionTypeKey,PolicyExpirationDate,AccountKey,TransactionExpirationDate,ProducerCode,TotalPremium,StatusKey,TotalPolicyModifierPercentage,TotalPolicyTaxAmount,InvoicedPremium,SubInsuranceCarrier from policytransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select p.policykey as PreviousPolicykey,max(f.VersionSequence) as previousVersionSequence FROM policy p inner join firmlw f on p.policykey=f.policykey where p.PolicyKey in (select MAX(PolicyKey) From policy where accountid in(select accountid from policy where policykey=#PolicyKey#) AND policynumber is not null and PolicyKey<#PolicyKey# ) group by f.VersionSequence,p.policykey

select AttorneyName,LicensedStates,AnnualWorkedHours,NumberOfYearsInPractice,NumberOfYearsWithFirm,NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov,AttorneyPriorActDate,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,PriorActDate,AttorneyDesignation,DesignationId,IsNonRatedAttorney,PriorActDateAttorneysNew from AttorneyDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select AnnualWorkedHours from AttorneyDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select TaxAOPKey,TaxAopDesc,revenuePercentage,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,TaxCommentDesc from TaxSuppDetailsLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select SmartSearchID,AOPKey,Percentage,PolicyKey,PercentageOld,IsEdit from SmartSearchValue where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select StateCode from state where StateDesc=#StateDesc#

select VersionSequence,PolicyKey,s1.AOPREKey,PercentageValue,AOPRECommentDesc,CommercialPercentageValue,AOPRECommCommentDesc from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW s1, AOPRELW s2 where s1.AOPREKey=s2.AOPREKey and s2.AOPREType='R' and s1.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select (select AliasEmail from userdetails where UserNo=#LastUpdateUserID#) as from_role_desc ,(select AliasEmail from UserDetails where UserNo in(select FirstReviewUserID from Firmlw where policykey=#PolicyKey#)) as to_role_desc, email_notification_id,event_name,description,subject,body,type,last_updated_by,last_updated_ts,subject_dynamicvalues,body_dynamicvalues,cc_role_desc,email_template ,attachment_content from email_notifications_new where event_name=#event_name#

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.Premium, pc.RetroActiveDate, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey from PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l,Deductibles d where pc.CoverageSequence=#CoverageSequence# and l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select FormID,StateCode,FormName,FormDesc,EffectiveDate,ExpirationDate,FormFooter,FormType,FormSequence,CompanyKey from StateFormLW where StateCode=#StateCode# and EffectiveDate < #PolicyEffectiveDate#

select case when adds.Address1 is null or adds.Address1='' then adds.Street else adds.Address1 end as Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (CASE WHEN adds.zip4 is not null THEN adds.zip+'-'+adds.zip4 ELSE adds.zip END) as Zip, StateCode,(select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, convert(varchar(20),pt.PolicyExpirationDate,101) as PolicyExpirationDate from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select d.DeductibleSequence, l.LimitSequence from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pc.IsClaimOptionType = #IsClaimOptionType# and pc.IsClaimExpensesType = #IsClaimExpensesType# and pc.IsDollarDefense = #IsDollarDefense# and l.LimitSequence =#LimitSequence# and d.DeductibleSequence =#DeductibleSequence#

select d.DeductibleSequence, l.LimitSequence from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pc.IsClaimOptionType = #IsClaimOptionType# and pc.IsClaimExpensesType = #IsClaimExpensesType# and pc.IsDollarDefense = #IsDollarDefense# and l.LimitSequence =#LimitSequence# and d.DeductibleSequence =#DeductibleSequence# and pc.IsManualPremium = #IsManualPremium#
select AgentEmail,AgentState,PassWord,UserNo,AgentName,LicenseNumber,IsActiveAgent,EligibleFirstReviewer,AliasEmail,ZohoUserID,IsActiveZohoUser from UserDetails where UserNo = #LastUpdateUserID#

select ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY q.PolicyKey ASC) AS ROWID, CASE WHEN IsClaimExpensesType='N' THEN PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) +' CEIL' else PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) +' CEOL' END as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) + CASE WHEN pc.IsDollarDefense = 'Y' THEN ' / ' + 'FDD' ELSE '' END as DeductibleAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pt.InvoicedPremium),1),2) as InvoicedPremium , PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pt.TotalPremium),1),2) as TotalPremium , pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, pc.IsClaimOptionType, CASE WHEN pc.IsClaimOptionType = 'N' THEN 'Each Claim' ELSE 'AGG' END AS QuoteType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsDollarDefense, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, pc.IsManualPremium from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and rt.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and rt.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and q.IsQuoteSelected='Y' and q.isShowQuote='Y' and pc.PolicyKey =#PolicyKey#
select convert(varchar, getdate(), 8) as QuoteTime

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.Premium, pc.RetroActiveDate, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and pt.PolicyKey = q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence = q.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select FORMAT(ProInsPremium,'C0') as ProInsPremium,InsuranceCompanyNamePross,IsPriorActDateFull, FirmYear, convert(varchar(20),PriorActDatePross,101) as PriorActDatePross, convert(varchar(20),PolicyExpirationDatePross,101) as PolicyExpirationDatePross from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select sf.FormID,sf.StateCode,sf.PolicyKey,sf.FormName,sf.FormDesc,sf.FormFooter,sf.FormType,sf.FormSequence from PolicyFormLW pf, StateFormLW sf where pf.FormID=sf.FormID and pf.StateCode=sf.StateCode and pf.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW Set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, QuoteEffectiveDate=#QuoteEffectiveDate#, QuoteExpiryDate=#QuoteExpiryDate#, Comment=#Comment# where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select convert(varchar, getdate(), 101) as QuoteDate

select d.DeductibleSequence, l.LimitSequence from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pc.IsClaimOptionType = #IsClaimOptionType# and pc.IsClaimExpensesType = #IsClaimExpensesType# and pc.IsDollarDefense = #IsDollarDefense# and l.LimitSequence =#LimitSequence# and d.DeductibleSequence =#DeductibleSequence#

select ProducerCode,Fax,CompleteAddress,LogoImagePath,ProducerName, Producer_email,NewCommission,RenewalCommission,SendQuoteLetter,SendRenewalSolicitation,StreetAddress,SPCity,State,SPZip,Archive,Date_added,SubProducerAccess,Signature,SPContactName,SPWebsite,SPPhoneNumber,SignatureText from SubProducer where ProducerCode IN (select ProducerCode from policyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#)

select ac.Website, ac.AccountEmail, ac.AccountName, adds.WorkExt, adds.WorkPhone, case when adds.Address1 is null or adds.Address1='' then adds.Street else adds.Address1 end as Address1, adds.Address2, adds.StateCode, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode=adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.City, adds.CountyDesc, adds.Zip , adds.Zip4, f.ContactPerson, f.ContactPhone, f.ContactPhoneExt, f.IsQuickQuoteByEmail, f.IsAnAgentCall, f.LicenseNumber, f.FirstReviewUserID as UserNo, convert(varchar(20),f.QuoteEffectiveDate,101) as QuoteEffectiveDate, convert(varchar(20),f.QuoteExpiryDate,101) as QuoteExpiryDate, f.IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns, f.IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance, p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber, convert(varchar(20),p.PolicyEffectiveDate,101) as PolicyEffectiveDate, convert(varchar, getdate(), 101) as CurrentDate,f.QuoteComment, f.ModifierComment, f.QuoteSentDate,adds.Street as Street from Account ac, Address adds, Policy p, FirmLW f where ac.AccountKey=#AccountKey# and adds.AddressKey=#AddressKey# and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and f.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY q.PolicyKey ASC) AS ROWID, d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit, pc.CoverageSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pt.TotalPremium),1),2) as TotalPremium , pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount),1),2) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pt.InvoicedPremium),1),2) as InvoicedPremium , pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsDollarDefense, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, rt.XmlOutputDatafromRating, pc.IsManualPremium from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and rt.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and rt.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and q.IsQuoteSelected='Y' and q.isShowQuote='Y' and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select pt.PolicyKey,pt.TransactionSequence,pc.CoverageSequence,rt.RatingTraceSequence from Policy p, PolicyTransaction pt, PolicyCoverage pc,RatingTrace rt where p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and p.PolicyKey= rt.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence = rt.TransactionSequence and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW where AOPREKey in (select AOPREKey from AOPRELW where AOPREType = 'C') and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select AOPREKey,AOPREDesc,AOPREType,AOPSequence,NewAppAOPSequence from AOPRELW where AOPREType = 'R' order by AOPSequence
sqlMap.delete: delete from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW where AOPREKey in (select AOPREKey from AOPRELW where AOPREType = 'R') and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select s1.VersionSequence,s1.PolicyKey,s1.AOPREKey,s1.PercentageValue,s1.AOPRECommentDesc,s1.CommercialPercentageValue,s1.AOPRECommCommentDesc,s1.VersionKey,s2.AOPREKey,s2.AOPREDesc,s2.AOPREType,s2.AOPSequence,s2.NewAppAOPSequence from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW s1, AOPRELW s2 where s1.AOPREKey=s2.AOPREKey and s2.AOPREType='C' and s1.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence,PolicyKey,AOPREKey,PercentageValue,AOPRECommentDesc,CommercialPercentageValue,AOPRECommCommentDesc from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select AOPREKey,AOPREDesc,AOPREType,AOPSequence,NewAppAOPSequence from AOPRELW where AOPREType = 'C' order by AOPSequence
select FLAOPKey,FLAopDesc from FamilyLawLW order by FLAOPkey

select s1.VersionSequence,s1.PolicyKey,s1.AOPREKey,s1.PercentageValue,s1.AOPRECommentDesc,s1.CommercialPercentageValue,s1.AOPRECommCommentDesc,s1.VersionKey,s2.AOPREKey,s2.AOPREDesc,s2.AOPREType,s2.AOPSequence,s2.NewAppAOPSequence from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW s1, AOPRELW s2 where s1.AOPREKey=s2.AOPREKey and s2.AOPREType='R' and s1.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select ai.AOPKey,AOPDescNew,PercentageValue,AOPCommentDesc,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,VersionKey,AreaOfPracticeKey,AreaOfPracticeCode from AreaOfPracticeLW ai inner join AOPLW ap on ai.AOPKey=ap.AOPKey where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and ai.AOPKey not in(7,17,19,23) order by ap.IndicationSequence asc

select AttroneyEnvWorkKey,EnvAttorneyName,NumberOfYrOfEnvExp,PercentOfTimeDevoted,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,VersionKey from AttorneyEnvWorkLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select pc.AggregateDeductible as DeductibleAmount, cast(pc.AggregateLimit as varchar(50)) +'/'+ cast(pc.OccuranceLimit as varchar(50)) as LimitAmount, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsDollarDefense, pc.ManualPremium from PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l,Deductibles d where pc.CoverageSequence=#CoverageSequence# and l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pc.TransactionSequence =#TransactionSequence#

select PolicyKey,TransactionSequence,QuoteEffectiveDate,QuoteExpiryDate,IsThisOptionFinalised,AcceptanceDate,IsQuoteSelected,IsFirstQuote,Comment,ClaimsMadeYearDesc,TotalPremiumFirstRange,IsMinimumPremium,QuoteDate,isShowQuote from Quote where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select PolicyKey,TransactionSequence,BankerName,RoutingNumber,AccountNumber,ChequeNumber,Amount,ContactPerson,ContactPhone,FinanceCompanyName,Detail,TransactionID,TransactionDate,TransactionStatus,PaymentMode,PaymentDetailId,FinanceInterval,FinanceDownPayment from PaymentDetail where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and PaymentDetailId=(select max(PaymentDetailId) from PaymentDetail where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# )

select a.AccountName as AccountName ,p.QuoteNumber as QuoteNumber from Account a,Policy p,PolicyTransaction pt,RatingTrace rt where pt.AccountKey= a.AccountKey and pt.PolicyKey = p.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and rt.PolicyKey = p.PolicyKey and rt.TransactionSequence =#TransactionSequence# and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select a.AOPREDesc, al.VersionSequence,al.PolicyKey,al.AOPREKey,al.PercentageValue,al.AOPRECommentDesc,al.CommercialPercentageValue,al.AOPRECommCommentDesc ,al.VersionKey from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW al, AOPRELW a where al.AOPREKey=a.AOPREKey and al.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and al.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
