select CoverageSequence,PolicyKey,TransactionSequence,MarketableProductKey,CoverageKey,Premium,RetroActiveDate,IsClaimOptionType,IsClaimExpensesType,SOISequence,AggregateLimit,OccuranceLimit,OccuranceDeductible,AggregateDeductible,TotalCovModifierPercentage,TotalCoverageTaxAmount,InitialCovPremium,Exposure,RiskState,RiskZip,ERPDate,Commission,AttachmentPoint,PrimaryAccess,ClassCode,IsDollarDefense,ManualPremium,IsManualPremium from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update PolicyTransaction set StatusKey = 2,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select pc.PolicyKey, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.IsManualPremium, pc.IsDollarDefense, q.TransactionSequence, q.QuoteEffectiveDate, q.QuoteExpiryDate, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.AcceptanceDate, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, q.Comment, q.ClaimsMadeYearDesc, q.TotalPremiumFirstRange, q.IsMinimumPremium, q.QuoteDate, q.isShowQuote from PolicyCoverage pc, Quote q where pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and q.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select a.AOPDesc, ap.AOPKey,ap.PercentageValue,ap.AOPCommentDesc,ap.PolicyKey,ap.VersionSequence,ap.VersionKey from AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW ap, AOPLW a where ap.AOPKey=a.AOPKey and ap.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and ap.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select PolicyKey,TransactionSequence,CoverageSequence,ModifierKey,Percentage,Comment,RenewalPercentage from CoverageModifiers where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount,PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,d.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW pli, Limits l, Deductibles d where l.LimitSequence = pli.LimitSequencePross and d.DeductibleSequence = pli.DeductibleSequencePross and pli.VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and pli.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey,ClientName,FieldOfEntertainment,TypeOfServices,FromDate,ToDate,IsCurrentClient,VersionSequence,PolicyKey from EnterSportsClientOfFirmLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence#

select PolicyKey,TransactionSequence,TransactionEffectiveDate,TransactionTypeKey,PolicyExpirationDate,AccountKey,TransactionExpirationDate,ProducerCode,TotalPremium,StatusKey,TotalPolicyModifierPercentage,TotalPolicyTaxAmount,InvoicedPremium,SubInsuranceCarrier from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount from Deductibles where DeductibleSequence=#DeductibleSequence#

select w.WESDesc, ws.WESKey,ws.CheckedValue,ws.PolicyKey,ws.VersionSequence,ws.WESCommentDesc,ws.PercentageValue,ws.VersionKey from WillsEstateServicesLW ws, WESLW w where ws.WESKey=w.WESKey and ws.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and ws.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select a.CCBDesc, al.CCBKey,al.CCBCheckedValue,al.CCBCommentDesc,al.PolicyKey,al.VersionSequence,al.VersionKey from CorpCommBusinessLW al, CCBLW a where al.CCBKey=a.CCBKey and al.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and al.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select AOTPKey,AOTPDesc from AOTPLW
select AggregateLimit,OccuranceLimit,LimitCode,CoverageKey,StateCode,LimitSequence from Limits where LimitSequence=#LimitSequence#

select a.AOLDesc, al.AOLKey,al.VersionSequence,al.PolicyKey,al.PercentageOfRevenue,al.AverageCaseSize,al.LargestCaseSize,al.AOLCommentDesc,al.PercentageOfDefense,al.DefenseCommentDesc,al.VersionKey from AreaOfLitigationForFirmLW al, AOLLW a where al.AOLKey=a.AOLKey and al.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and al.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select a.AOPDescNew, ap.AOPKey,ap.PercentageValue,ap.AOPCommentDesc,ap.PolicyKey,ap.VersionSequence,ap.VersionKey from AreaOfPracticeQuickQuoteLW ap, AOPLW a where ap.AOPKey=a.AOPKey and ap.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and ap.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and PercentageValue > 0

select VersionSequence,PolicyKey,IsERPPurchased,FirmName,TypeOfEntity,DissolutionDate,NumberOfAttorneyAtDiss,NumberOfAttorneyAtApplFirm,InsurerAtDissolution,ERPExpDate,ProdecessorFirmKey,DateOfAcquisation,VersionKey from ProdecessorFirmLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select AOPREKey,AOPREDesc,AOPREType,AOPSequence,NewAppAOPSequence from AOPRELW

select FirmPersonnelServedKey,FirmMember,EntityName,PositionHeld,PercentEquityInterest,IsDirOffInsInForce,FirmServices,IsIndividualPerformServices,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,NatureOfClientBusiness,VersionKey from FirmPersonnelServedLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select AttorneyInPlaintiffKey,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,PlaintiffAttorneyName,PlaintiffYrsExp,PlaintiffPecOfTimeDev,VersionKey from AttorneyInPlaintiffForFirmLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select FirmPracticeLocationKey,PolicyKey,FPLAddress,FPLCity,FPLCounty,FPLZip,NumberOfAttorneys,NumberOfOtherEmployees,NumberOfBillabeHours,FPLStateCode,FPLZip4 from FirmPracticeLocationLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit,PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit,LimitCode,CoverageKey from Limits where LimitSequence=#LimitSequence#
select a.AOPDesc, ap.AOPKey, ap.PercentageValue, ap.AOPCommentDesc from AreaOfPracticeLW ap, AOPLW a where ap.AOPKey=a.AOPKey and ap.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and ap.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select max(AccountID)as maxAccountID from Account
select TransactionSequence from Quote where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and IsThisOptionFinalised='Y'

select pc.AggregateDeductible as DeductibleAmount,pc.IsClaimOptionType,pc.IsDollarDefense from PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l,Deductibles d where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pc.TransactionSequence =(select TransactionSequence from quote where policykey=#PolicyKey# and IsThisOptionFinalised='Y')

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateDeductible) as DeductibleAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) +'/' +dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as LimitAmount, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(q.TotalPremiumFirstRange)+'-'+dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremiumFirstRange, pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as InvoicedPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.ManualPremium) as ManualPremium, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, (CASE pc.IsClaimExpensesType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) as IsClaimExpensesType, (CASE pc.IsClaimOptionType WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) as IsClaimOptionType, (CASE pc.IsDollarDefense WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Manual' ELSE 'Auto' END) as IsDollarDefenseText, pc.IsDollarDefense as IsDollarDefense, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, rt.RatingTraceSequence from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update FirmLW set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, IsFirmReferred=#IsFirmReferred# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
sqlMap.select: select p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber,p.IsFullQuote,p.IsQuickQuote ,p.PolicyKey, p.isUncompletedData, p.PolicyEffectiveDate, a.AccountName, substring(a.AccountName,1,15) as ContextAccountName, a.AccountEmail, pt.TransactionSequence, pt.PolicyExpirationDate, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey, adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, adds.Address1 ,adds.WorkPhone, s.StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, p.PolicyStatusKey, pt.TransactionTypeKey, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as Premium, adds.CountyDesc from Policy p, Account a, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=(select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence=(select min(CoverageSequence)from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and a.AccountEmail= #AccountEmail# and p.PolicyKey != #PolicyKey#

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount,PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.Premium, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsDollarDefense, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible,pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey,pc.TransactionSequence, pc.MarketableProductKey, pc.InitialCovPremium,pc.ManualPremium, pt.TransactionEffectiveDate ,pt.TransactionTypeKey, pt.PolicyExpirationDate, pt.AccountKey,pt.TransactionExpirationDate,pt.ProducerCode,pt.TotalPremium,pt.StatusKey,pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount,pt.InvoicedPremium, pt.SubInsuranceCarrier,q.QuoteEffectiveDate,q.QuoteExpiryDate ,q.IsThisOptionFinalised,q.AcceptanceDate, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.ClaimsMadeYearDesc,q.TotalPremiumFirstRange,q.IsMinimumPremium,rt.RatingTraceSequence,rt.XmlInputDatatoRating, rt.XmlOutputDatafromRating,rt.RatingDate from PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l,Deductibles d ,Quote q, PolicyTransaction pt, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and pt.PolicyKey = q.PolicyKey and pt.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence = q.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y'

select PolicyKey,VersionSequence,ClientNameForAnnlRevenue,PercentageOfAnnlRevenue,ServicesRendered,FirmAnnualRevenueKey,VersionKey from FirmAnnualRevenueLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select AggregateLimit,OccuranceLimit,LimitCode,CoverageKey,StateCode,LimitSequence from Limits where LimitSequence=#LimitSequence#

select ProfLiabClaimAgnstFirmKey,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,NameOfClaimant,ClaimNotifiedDate,DateOfAllegedError,NameOfPersonnelINClaim,DescOfClaim,IsClaimReportedToInsComp,NameOfInsComp,DateReportedToInsComp,InsurerLoss,ClaimClosingDate,TotalAmountPaid,StepsTakenToPreventClaims,ClaimantLastDemand,IsClient,CurrentStatus,IsClaimInSuit,ClaimNumber,InsurerLossReserveCi,ExpensePaid,TotalIncurred,Signal,ExpenseReserve,VersionKey,ClaimLawyerAndFirm,ClaimAdditionalDefendants,ClaimClaimants,ClaimAllegedErrorDate,ClaimCarrier,ClaimReportedToCarrierDate,ClaimStatus,ClaimPaidLosses,ClaimLossReserves,ClaimPaidExpenses,ClaimExpenseReserves,ClaimClosedDate,ClaimClosedExpensesPaid,ClaimClosedLossPaid,ClaimAllegedActDescription,ClaimPreventiveRecurrenceProcedures from ProfLiabClaimAgnstFirmLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select AttorneyKey,AttorneyName,LicensedStates,AnnualWorkedHours,NumberOfYearsInPractice,NumberOfYearsWithFirm,NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov,AttorneyPriorActDate,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,PriorActDate,AttorneyDesignation,DesignationId,IsNonRatedAttorney,PriorActDateAttorneysNew,isAttorneyEndorsed,VersionKey,JoiningDate,AttorneyRetroDate,RegNumber,DateAdmitted from AttorneyDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select LastUpdateUserID from Account where AccountKey = #AccountKey#

select isNull(p.PolicyNumber,'') as PolicyNumber,pt.StatusKey from Policy p, PolicyTransaction pt where p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence = (select TransactionSequence from Quote where IsThisOptionFinalised = 'Y' and PolicyKey = p.PolicyKey) and p.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ci.ClientIndustryDesc as ClientIndustryDescFc from FundsControlledSupp fcs, ClientIndustry ci where fcs.ClientIndustryFc=ci.ClientIndustryKey and fcs.VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and fcs.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select FirminitLawsuitsKey,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,AmountOfFeesSued,DueDateFees,SuitFilesDateFees,IsFavOutInUnderMatter,IsAllegOfLegalMalPrac,FeesAreaOfPractice,FeeSuitDispositionKey,VersionKey from FirmInitLawsuitsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select ContractorEnvKey,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,ContractorName,ContServicesPerformed,PercentOfEnvGBillings,IsEvidenceRequired,VersionKey from ContractorEnvLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select a.AOTPDesc, ap.VersionSequence,ap.PolicyKey,ap.AOTPKey,ap.PercentageValue,ap.AOTPCommentDesc,ap.VersionKey from AreaOfTaxPracticeLW ap, AOTPLW a where ap.AOTPKey=a.AOTPKey and ap.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and ap.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey,TaxAttorneyName,NumberOfYrOfTaxExp,PercentOfTimeDevoted,IsCertifiedTax,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,VersionKey from AttorneyHaveTaxWorkLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select pc.AggregateDeductible as DeductibleAmount, cast(pc.AggregateLimit as varchar(50)) +'/'+ cast(pc.OccuranceLimit as varchar(50)) as LimitAmount ,pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsDollarDefense, pc.ManualPremium from PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l,Deductibles d ,quote q where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.policyKey=q.policykey and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y'and pc.TransactionSequence =q.transactionsequence and pc.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select AttorneyInEntertainKey,Years,AttorneyName,NumberOfYrsInSpec,PercentageOfTimeDev,PolicyKey,VersionSequence from AttorneyInEntertainForFirmLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence#
select PolicyKey,TransactionSequence,RatingTraceSequence,XmlInputDatatoRating,XmlOutputDatafromRating,RatingDate from RatingTrace where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select FinancialInstitutionKey,FirmMember,NatureOfCapOfServices,DateInitiated,DateEnded,IsClient,DateOfInsolvency,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,InstitutionName,InstitutionState,VersionKey from FinancialInstitutionLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select AccountKey, AccountID, AccountName, Website, AccountEmail, AccountVersion, LoginID, secondaryEmail from Account where AccountID = #AccountID#

select cm.PolicyKey,cm.TransactionSequence,cm.CoverageSequence,cm.ModifierKey,cm.Percentage,cm.Comment,cm.RenewalPercentage from CoverageModifiers cm where cm.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and cm.TransactionSequence= (select min(TransactionSequence) from CoverageModifiers where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#)
select max(AccountNum)as maxAccountNum from Account where AccountID=#AccountID#
select FirmEnvClientsKey,EnvClientName,TypesOfWork,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,VersionKey from FirmEnvClientsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select AggregateDeductible, OccuranceDeductible, CoverageKey, DeductibleSequence from Deductibles where DeductibleSequence=#DeductibleSequence#

select ISNULL(VersionSequence, 0) as VersionSequence,ISNULL(PolicyKey, 0) as PolicyKey,ISNULL(NumberOfAttorneyInPlantiffWork, 0) as NumberOfAttorneyInPlantiffWork,ISNULL(PercentOfAttorneyTimeDevToPlantiff, 0) as PercentOfAttorneyTimeDevToPlantiff,ISNULL(NumberOfSuppotedStaffToPlantiff, 0) as NumberOfSuppotedStaffToPlantiff,ISNULL(NumberOfInjuryCasesIn12Month, 0) as NumberOfInjuryCasesIn12Month,ISNULL(NumberOfInjuryHandleByAttorney, 0) as NumberOfInjuryHandleByAttorney,ISNULL(IsApplAdvertiseByTelevision, '') as IsApplAdvertiseByTelevision,ISNULL(IsApplAdvertiseByRadio, '') as IsApplAdvertiseByRadio,ISNULL(IsApplAdvertiseByNewspaper, '') as IsApplAdvertiseByNewspaper,ISNULL(IsApplAdvertiseByYellowpages, '') as IsApplAdvertiseByYellowpages,ISNULL(IsRefAggrementReferToAppl, '') as IsRefAggrementReferToAppl,ISNULL(IsRefAggrementReferToApplRefersOut, '') as IsRefAggrementReferToApplRefersOut,ISNULL(IsAppAcceptRefersFromOtherFirms, '') as IsAppAcceptRefersFromOtherFirms,ISNULL(IsSettlementAggrementsUsed, '') as IsSettlementAggrementsUsed,ISNULL(IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLim, '') as IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLim,ISNULL(PerOfCasesBeforeTrail, 0) as PerOfCasesBeforeTrail,ISNULL(PerOfCasesTriedToConclusion, 0) as PerOfCasesTriedToConclusion,ISNULL(PerOfCasesReferToApplicant, 0) as PerOfCasesReferToApplicant,ISNULL(IsAppConfirmCarryProfLiabIns, '') as IsAppConfirmCarryProfLiabIns,ISNULL(IsApplAdvertiseByMagazine, '') as IsApplAdvertiseByMagazine,ISNULL(IsApplAdvertiseByInternet, '') as IsApplAdvertiseByInternet,ISNULL(PerOfCasesSettledBeforeTrail, 0) as PerOfCasesSettledBeforeTrail,ISNULL(IsAppReferToOtherLawFirms, '') as IsAppReferToOtherLawFirms,ISNULL(IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLimDesc, '') as IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLimDesc,ISNULL(massTortOrClassAction, '') as massTortOrClassAction from PlantiffSuppLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select adds.*, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, DATENAME(month,pt.PolicyExpirationDate) +' '+ DATENAME(day,pt.PolicyExpirationDate)+', '+ DATENAME(year,pt.PolicyExpirationDate) as PolicyExpirationDate from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#
select AttorneyInPlaintiffKey,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,PlaintiffAttorneyName,PlaintiffYrsExp,PlaintiffPecOfTimeDev,VersionKey from AttorneyInPlaintiffForFirmLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select AOPREKey,AOPREDesc,AOPREType,AOPSequence,NewAppAOPSequence from AOPRELW

select IsBusinessRelationWithApplEnt, IsApplSoughtHaveAuthForEntertain, IsApplProvideInvestForEntertain, IsApplServedAsTrustee, IsApplNagotiatePersonnelApp, ApplDetailsForCoverageSought, IsApplCovSoughtServeAsManager, ApplCovSoughtServeAsManagerDetails, IsApplCoverageAcceptPercForFees, IsApplCoverageAcceptCompensation, ApplCoverageAcceptDetails from EntertainmentSportSuppLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence#

select AOPKey,PercentageValue,AOPCommentDesc,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,VersionKey,AreaOfPracticeKey,AreaOfPracticeCode from AreaOfPracticeLW where policykey=#PolicyKey# and (AOPKey=20 or AOPKey=27) and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select PolicyKey,VersionSequence,distributionWareinghouseCases,cannibsLicensing,canniabisInvestmentServices,StateOrLocalCompliance,IntellectualProperty,NegotiatePurchaseContracts,RepresentClientLitigation,ISNULL(CannibsOther, '') as CannibsOther,CannibsOtherDesc from CannabisSupplement where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select FIAOPID,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,equityInterest,servicesRelatedRegulatory,underRegulatoryReview,haveBecomeBankruptInsolvent,VersionKey,LawyersCountPerformFinancialWork,YearsOfExperienceForFinancialInstitution,FinancialInstResidentialTitleWork,FinancialInstCommercialTitleWork,FinancialInstFinancialAdvisoryServices,FinancialInstRegulatoryExaminations,FinancialInstBankruptcyOrCollection,FinancialInstTrusts,FinancialInstOther,FinancialInstOtherDesc,HasInvolvedWithLoanTransactions,HasprovidedTaxBenifitTransactions from FinancialInstitutionDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select AttorneyInEntertainKey,Years,AttorneyName,NumberOfYrsInSpec,PercentageOfTimeDev,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,VersionKey from AttorneyInEntertainForFirmLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence#

select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,d.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount, p.InsuranceCompanyNamePross,p.PolicyExpirationDatePross,p.IsClaimExpLiability,p.IsPerClaim,p.PriorActDatePross,dbo.getAmountFormat(p.ProInsPremium) as ProInsPremium,p.IsProfDefenceExpense, p.FirmYear, p.IsPriorActDateFull from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW p,Limits l,Deductibles d where p.LimitSequencePross=l.LimitSequence and p.DeductibleSequencePross=d.DeductibleSequence and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and p.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select CollectionsID,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,averageCases,consumerCollections,commercialollections,individualCollections,personnelToCollectDebts,servicesToPurchasers,claimsOrSuitsFDCPA,VersionKey,LawyersPerformCollectionWorkCount,YearsOfExperience,CommercialCollections,MortgageForeclosures,CasesHandledPast12Months,DollarValueForCasesHandled,MaximumValueForsingleCaseHandled,ServicesFordebtPurchasers,ServicesFordebtPurchasersDesc,AcceptCollectionCases,AcceptCollectionCasesDesc,DoesVerifyComplianceFDCPA,HasAllegedDebtVerified,HasAllegedDebtVerifiedDesc,HaveLettersAndCorrespondenceReviewed,HaveLettersAndCorrespondenceReviewedDesc,DoesUseFormalScript,DoesUseFormalScriptDesc,DoesPermitOutsideCollection,DoesPermitOutsideCollectionDesc,HasOwnershipInterest,HasOwnershipInterestDesc,HasAttorneysExecuted,HasAttorneysExecutedDesc from collectionsSuplimentDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select AOTPKey,AOTPDesc from AOTPLW

select FirmPracticeLocationKey,PolicyKey,FPLAddress,FPLCity,FPLCounty,FPLZip,NumberOfAttorneys,NumberOfOtherEmployees,NumberOfBillabeHours,FPLStateCode,FPLZip4 from FirmPracticeLocationLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select AttorneysInsuranceId,insuranceCarrierFirstAttoryneyInsurance,policyPeriodFirstAttoryneyInsurance,limitDeductibleFirstAttoryneyInsurance,numberOfAttorneysFirstAttoryneyInsurance,premiumFirstAttoryneyInsurance,insuranceCarrierSecondAttorneyInsurance,policyPeriodSecondAttorneyInsurance,limitDeductibleSecondAttorneyInsurance,numberOfAttorneysSecondAttorneyInsurance,premiumSecondAttorneyInsurance,insuranceCarrierThirdAttorneyInsurance,policyPeriodThirdAttorneyInsurance,limitDeductibleThirdAttorneyInsurance,numberOfAttorneysForThirdAttorneyInsurance,premiumThirdAttorneyInsurance,policyKey from AttorneysInsurance where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select a.CCBDesc, al.CCBKey,al.CCBCheckedValue,al.CCBCommentDesc,al.PolicyKey,al.VersionSequence,al.VersionKey from CorpCommBusinessLW al, CCBLW a where al.CCBKey=a.CCBKey and al.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and al.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

SELECT ISNULL(OtherLegalCorporateServices, '') as OtherLegalCorporateServices, ISNULL(CorporateServiceDesc1, '') as CorporateServiceDesc1, ISNULL(CorporateServiceDesc2, '') as CorporateServiceDesc2, ISNULL(CorporateServiceDesc3, '') as CorporateServiceDesc3, ISNULL(CorporateServicePercentage1, 0) as CorporateServicePercentage1, ISNULL(CorporateServicePercentage2, 0) as CorporateServicePercentage2, ISNULL(CorporateServicePercentage3, 0) as CorporateServicePercentage3, ISNULL(PubliclyRenderedServices, '') as PubliclyRenderedServices, ISNULL(PubliclyRenderedServicesDesc, '') as PubliclyRenderedServicesDesc, ISNULL(LegalBusinessRelationshipServices, '') as LegalBusinessRelationshipServices, ISNULL(AuthorityToDisburseFunds, '') as AuthorityToDisburseFunds, ISNULL(AcceptCompensation, '') as AcceptCompensation, ISNULL(LegalServicesSecuritiesPayment, '') as LegalServicesSecuritiesPayment, ISNULL(PerformDueDiligence, '') as PerformDueDiligence, ISNULL(DetailedDescCorporateServices, '') as DetailedDescCorporateServices, ISNULL(LegalServicesBankruptLiquidation, '') as LegalServicesBankruptLiquidation from CorporateCommBusineesSupplementLW Where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForResi,ApproxNumberOfPurchaseForComm,dbo.getAmountFormat(LargestPurchaseForResi) as LargestPurchaseForResi,dbo.getAmountFormat(LasrgestPurchaseForComm) as LasrgestPurchaseForComm,IsApplRenderedRealPropMatters,IsFirmRequireInvestOfEnvRisks,IsApplPerfEscowServices from RealEstateSuppLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ao.AOLDesc,a.PercentageOfRevenue,dbo.getAmountFormat(a.AverageCaseSize) as AverageCaseSize,dbo.getAmountFormat(a.LargestCaseSize) as LargestCaseSize,a.AOLCommentDesc from AreaOfLitigationForFirmLW a,AOLLW ao where a.AOLKey=ao.AOLKey and a.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and a.VersionSequence = #VersionSequence#
select ao.AOPDesc,a.PercentageValue,a.AOPCommentDesc,a.AOPKey from AreaOfPracticeLW a,AOPLW ao where a.AOPKey=ao.AOPKey and a.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey,ClientName,FieldOfEntertainment,TypeOfServices,FromDate,ToDate,IsCurrentClient,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,VersionKey from EnterSportsClientOfFirmLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence#
select PolicyKey,VersionSequence,ClientNameForAnnlRevenue,PercentageOfAnnlRevenue,ServicesRendered,FirmAnnualRevenueKey from FirmAnnualRevenueLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select AOPKey,AOPDescAOPDescNew,IndicationSequence from AOPLW

select tt.TypeofTrustDesc as TrustsTypedesc ,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,TrustName,TrustsType,AssetsValue,BeneficiaryInterest,LargestTrustsKey,VersionKey from WillSTrustEstateLargestTrustsDetails wi left join TypeofTrust tt on tt.TypeofTrustKey=wi.TrustsType where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence,PolicyKey,IsApplDesignedTaxShelter,IsIRSChallenged,IsApplInvInPrivMemo,PlacementMemoDetails,IsApplSubjOfFedState from TaxSuppLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence#
select AttroneyEnvWorkKey,EnvAttorneyName,NumberOfYrOfEnvExp,PercentOfTimeDevoted,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,VersionKey from AttorneyEnvWorkLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select BankruptcyDetailsID,personalBankrupties,commercialBankruptcies,representedDebtors,preBankruptcyServices,dueDiligenceProcess,reviewProcedureForCertification,disclosureStatementExplaining,conspicuousStatement,policyKey,VersionSequence,CountOfLawyersForBankruptcy,AverageYearsOfBankruptcyExperience,DebtorRepresentation,CreditorRepresentation,AsTrustee,BankruptcyOther,BankruptcyOtherDesc,HasProceduresToCertifyAccuracy,ProceduresToCertifyAccuracyDesc,HasRepresentedDebtors,HasRepresentedTotalDebtors,HasRepresentedDebtorsDesc,companyFinance from BankruptcyDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select ao.AOTPDesc,a.PercentageValue,a.AOTPCommentDesc from AreaOfTaxPracticeLW a,AOTPLW ao where a.AOTPKey=ao.AOTPKey and a.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and a.VersionSequence = #VersionSequence#

select ao.AOPREDesc,a.PercentageValue,a.AOPRECommentDesc from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW a,AOPRELW ao where a.AOPREKey=ao.AOPREKey and a.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and a.VersionSequence = #VersionSequence#

select p.PolicyNumber, REPLACE(CONVERT(varchar(20), (CAST(pc.AggregateLimit AS money)), 1), '.00', '') as AggregateLimit, REPLACE(CONVERT(varchar(20), (CAST(pc.OccuranceLimit AS money)), 1), '.00', '') as OccuranceLimit, REPLACE(CONVERT(varchar(20), (CAST(pc.OccuranceDeductible AS money)), 1), '.00', '') as OccuranceDeductible,pt.InvoicedPremium from Policy p inner join PolicyCoverage pc on p.PolicyKey=pc.PolicyKey inner join Quote q on q.policykey=pc.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence=pc.TransactionSequence inner join PolicyTransaction pt on pt.PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence=pc.TransactionSequence where p.policykey=#PolicyKey# and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y'

select ac.Website, ac.AccountEmail, ac.AccountName, adds.WorkExt, adds.WorkPhone,adds.otherPhone, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.StateCode,adds.CountyDesc, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode=adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.City, adds.Zip , adds.Zip4, f.ContactPerson, f.ContactPhone, f.ContactPhoneExt, f.IsQuickQuoteByEmail, f.IsAnAgentCall, f.LicenseNumber, f.IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns, p.QuoteNumber, convert(char,p.PolicyEffectiveDate,101) as PolicyEffectiveDate,adds.Street as Street,adds.otherPhone as otherPhone,ac.secondaryEmail as secondaryEmail,p.CompanyKey from Account ac, Address adds, Policy p, FirmLW f where ac.AccountKey=#AccountKey# and adds.AddressKey=(select addresskey from AccountAddress where AccountKey=#AccountKey#) and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and f.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and f.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select FirmPersonnelServedKey,FirmMember,EntityName,PositionHeld,PercentEquityInterest,IsDirOffInsInForce,FirmServices,IsIndividualPerformServices,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,NatureOfClientBusiness,VersionKey from FirmPersonnelServedLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select NameOfClaimant,ClaimNotifiedDate,DateOfAllegedError,NameOfPersonnelINClaim,DescOfClaim,IsClaimReportedToInsComp,NameOfInsComp,DateReportedToInsComp,dbo.getAmountFormat(InsurerLoss) as InsurerLoss,ClaimClosingDate,dbo.getAmountFormat(TotalAmountPaid) as TotalAmountPaid,StepsTakenToPreventClaims,dbo.getAmountFormat(ClaimantLastDemand) as ClaimantLastDemand,IsClient,CurrentStatus,IsClaimInSuit from ProfLiabClaimAgnstFirmLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey,TaxAttorneyName,NumberOfYrOfTaxExp,PercentOfTimeDevoted,IsCertifiedTax,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,VersionKey from AttorneyHaveTaxWorkLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence#

select top 1 transactionsHandled12MonthsResi,transactionsHandled12MonthsComm,largestTransaction12MonthsResi,largestTransaction12MonthsComm,attendClosings,includeSecuringFinancing,useDisclosureForm,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,VersionKey,RealEstateKey,RealEstNumberOfLawyers,RealEstAvgExperience,RealEstFormationInvolvement,RealEstFormationInvolvementDesc,RealEstLimitPart,RealEstSyndications,RealEstInvestmentTrusts,RealEstBusinessRel,RealEstBusinessRelDesc,RealEstPercentLegalFees,RealEstPercentLegalFeesDesc from RealEastateDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select ContractorEnvKey,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,ContractorName,ContServicesPerformed,PercentOfEnvGBillings,IsEvidenceRequired,VersionKey from ContractorEnvLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#

select FinancialInstitutionKey,FirmMember,NatureOfCapOfServices,DateInitiated,DateEnded,IsClient,DateOfInsolvency,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,InstitutionName,InstitutionState,VersionKey from FinancialInstitutionLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence,PolicyKey,IsApplPerformServiceToBankruptcy,IsApplServedAsCEOCouncel,IsFinanInstProvideAggrement,IsApplHadEquityInterest,IsApplClientDeclaredInsolvent,IsApplProvideServToCompliance,InterestOrCommAmounts,IsAppHaveKnwOfFidilityOff,VersionKey from FinancialInstSuppLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select w.WESDesc, ws.WESKey,ws.CheckedValue,ws.PolicyKey,ws.VersionSequence,ws.WESCommentDesc,ws.PercentageValue from WillsEstateServicesLW ws, WESLW w where ws.WESKey=w.WESKey and ws.VersionSequence=#VersionSequence# and ws.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

ISNULL(isCannibSuppPage, '') as isCannibSuppPage, ISNULL(RecordType, '') as RecordType, ISNULL(CreatedDate, '') as CreatedDate, ISNULL(VersionKey, '') as VersionKey, isConvertedFromBrokerageEmail, ISNULL(hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported, '') as hasAnyFirmPersonnelReported, ISNULL(isAutoQuoteMailSent, '') as isAutoQuoteMailSent, select dbo.getAmountFormat(flw.AmountOfFeesSued) as AmountOfFeesSued,flw.DueDateFees,flw.SuitFilesDateFees,flw.IsFavOutInUnderMatter,flw.IsAllegOfLegalMalPrac,flw.FeesAreaOfPractice, (select FeeSuitDesc from FeeSuitDispositionLW where FeeSuitDispositionKey=flw.FeeSuitDispositionKey) as FeeSuitDesc from FirmInitLawsuitsLW flw where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select AttorneyName from AttorneyDetailsLW where AttorneyKey=#nameOfAttorney#

select top 1 d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit, pc.Premium, pc.RetroActiveDate, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsDollarDefense, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey from PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l,Deductibles d where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select PolicyStatusKey,CompanyKey from Policy where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select GAOPID,providingBondWork,eminentDomainServices,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,VersionKey from GovernmentSupplementDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select ServiceName,ServicesProvided,PolicyKey,VersionSequence,GovtServiceKey,VersionKey from GovernmentServicesDetails where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=#VersionSequence#
select YearEndDate, dbo.getAmountFormat(Amount) as Amount from GrossRevenueForFirmLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select CCBKey,CCBDesc from CCBLW
select top 1 ProducerCode as SubProducerNumber from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select act.AccountName,addr.address1 as Address1,addr.address2 as Address2,addr.City,addr.StateCode,addr.Zip,addr.Zip4,convert(varchar(20),getdate(),101) as CreationDate,p.PolicyNumber,convert(varchar(20),p.PolicyEffectivedate,101) as PolicyEffectivedate,convert(varchar(20),pt.PolicyExpirationDate,101) as PolicyExpirationDate, REPLACE(CONVERT(varchar(20), (CAST(cov.OccuranceLimit AS money)), 1), '.00', '') as OccuranceLimit,REPLACE(CONVERT(varchar(20), (CAST(cov.AggregateLimit AS money)), 1), '.00', '') as AggregateLimit,REPLACE(CONVERT(varchar(20), (CAST(cov.OccuranceDeductible AS money)), 1), '.00', '') as OccuranceDeductible from Policy p inner join PolicyTransaction pt on pt.policykey=p.policykey inner join AccountAddress aa on aa.AccountKey=pt.Accountkey inner join Account act on act.AccountKey=aa.AccountKey inner join Address addr on addr.AddressKey=aa.AddressKey inner join PolicyCoverage cov on cov.PolicyKey=pt.policykey and cov.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence inner join quote q on q.policykey=pt.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence where p.policykey=#PolicyKey# and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y'
select bankruptcyKey,Percentage,AverageCaseValue from BankruptcyCasesDetailsLW_NEW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
select FirmEnvClientsKey,EnvClientName,TypesOfWork,VersionSequence,PolicyKey,VersionKey from FirmEnvClientsLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence,PolicyKey,IsApplMaintEquityInTitle,PercentageOfEquityInt,IsTitleHaveProfLiabCoverage,NumberOfTitleIssued,NumberOfTitleAttInFirm,NumberOfTitleAttNotInFirm,NumberOfTitleNonAttInFirm,NumberOfTitleNonAttSubCont,IsApplObtCertOfInsOfTitle,NumberOfRealEstTitleIns,PercentOfTitleFromResi,PercentOfTitleFromComm,PercentOfTitleFromAgri,IsFirmUseEngageLetterOfTitle,IsTitleInsAgencyIssuePolicy,TitleInsuranceCompany,IsTitleInsDeclineToAppl,NameAndReasonOfTitle,IsApplCovProfLiabPolicy,PercentOfTitleFromOther,PercentOfTitleFromOther_CommentDesc,VersionKey from TitleSuppLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select PolicyKey,VersionSequence,FLAOPKey,PercentageValue,FLAOPCommentDesc,VersionKey from FamilyLawDetailsLW where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select ac.Website, ac.AccountEmail, ac.AccountName, adds.WorkExt, adds.WorkPhone, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.StateCode, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode=adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.City, adds.CountyDesc, adds.Zip , adds.Zip4, f.ContactPerson, f.ContactPhone, f.ContactPhoneExt, f.IsQuickQuoteByEmail, f.IsAnAgentCall, f.LicenseNumber, f.FirstReviewUserID as UserNo, convert(varchar(20),f.QuoteEffectiveDate,101) as QuoteEffectiveDate, convert(varchar(20),f.QuoteExpiryDate,101) as QuoteExpiryDate, f.IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns, f.IsFirmHaveLawyersLiabilityInsurance, p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber, convert(varchar(20),p.PolicyEffectiveDate,101) as PolicyEffectiveDate, convert(varchar, getdate(), 101) as CurrentDate,f.QuoteComment, f.ModifierComment, f.QuoteSentDate, profLW.FirmYear, f.IsClaimInLastFiveYears, f.IsFirmReferred from Account ac, Address adds, Policy p, FirmLW f, ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW profLW where ac.AccountKey=#AccountKey# and adds.AddressKey=#AddressKey# and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and f.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and profLW.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount,PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount,PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit,PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.Premium, pc.RetroActiveDate, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible,pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey,pc.TransactionSequence, pc.MarketableProductKey,pc.InitialCovPremium,pc.Exposure,pc.RiskState,pc.RiskZip,pc.ERPDate,pc.Commission, pc.AttachmentPoint,pc.PrimaryAccess,pc.ClassCode,pc.ManualPremium, pt.TransactionEffectiveDate ,pt.TransactionTypeKey,pt.PolicyExpirationDate, pt.AccountKey,pt.TransactionExpirationDate,pt.ProducerCode,pt.TotalPremium,pt.StatusKey,pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount,pt.InvoicedPremium,pt.SubInsuranceCarrier,q.QuoteEffectiveDate,q.QuoteExpiryDate ,q.IsThisOptionFinalised,q.AcceptanceDate, q.IsQuoteSelected,q.ClaimsMadeYearDesc,q.TotalPremiumFirstRange,q.IsMinimumPremium,rt.RatingTraceSequence,rt.XmlInputDatatoRating, rt.XmlOutputDatafromRating,rt.RatingDate from PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l,Deductibles d ,Quote q, PolicyTransaction pt,RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and pt.PolicyKey = q.PolicyKey and pt.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence = q.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pc.TransactionSequence =#TransactionSequence#
select StateCode from State where IssueMailLwy = 'Y'

select p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey ,adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, pt.StatusKey, pt.TransactionTypeKey, pt.TransactionSequence, f.VersionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, p.MarketableProductKey, pc.CoverageKey from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.MarketableProductKey = 2 and pc.CoverageKey = 3 and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=(select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence=(select min(CoverageSequence)from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select p.AppCreatedDate as RatingDate,d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateDeductible) as DeductibleAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) +'/' +dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as LimitAmount, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(q.TotalPremiumFirstRange)+'-'+dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as TotalPremiumFirstRange, pt.TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPolicyTaxAmount) as TotalPolicyTaxAmount, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as InvoicedPremium, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.ManualPremium) as ManualPremium, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.AggregateLimit) as AggregateLimitText, dbo.getAmountFormat(pc.OccuranceLimit) as OccuranceLimitText, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsClaimOptionType, (CASE pc.IsDollarDefense WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Manual' ELSE 'Auto' END) as IsDollarDefenseText,(case when pc.IsDollarDefense is not null and pc.IsDollarDefense!='' then pc.IsDollarDefense else 'N' END )as IsDollarDefense, q.IsThisOptionFinalised, q.IsQuoteSelected, q.IsFirstQuote, rt.RatingTraceSequence, rt.XmlOutputDatafromRating, pt.ProducerCode from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt,Policy p, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and q.TransactionSequence=#FinalisedQuote_TransactionSequence#

select p.PolicyKey,convert(varchar(10), cast(PolicyEffectiveDate as date), 101) as PolicyEffectiveDate,AccountID,PolicyNumber,isUncompletedData,QuoteNumber,IsFullQuote,IsQuickQuote,MarketableProductKey,ReasonStatusComment,ReasonStatusTypeKey,PolicyStatusKey,InsuredUpdateTimeStamp,AppCreatedDate,RenewOfPolicyNumber,QuoteType,p.VersionKey,c.Code as CompanyCode from Policy p inner join Company c on p.CompanyKey=c.CompanyKey where p.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#

select adds.AddressKey,adds.Address1,adds.Address2,adds.StateCode,adds.AddressTypeKey,adds.Street, adds.city as CityText, adds.CountyDesc as CountyText,adds.cityKey as CitySelect, (CASE WHEN adds.zip4 is not null THEN adds.zip+'-'+adds.zip4 ELSE adds.zip END) as Zip,(select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, (CASE p.PolicyStatusKey WHEN '2' THEN CASE isNull(pt.ProducerCode,'') WHEN '' THEN s.StatusDesc + '(R)' ELSE s.StatusDesc + '(R) (P)' END ELSE CASE isNull(pt.ProducerCode,'') WHEN '' THEN s.StatusDesc ELSE s.StatusDesc + '(P)' END END) as headerStatusDesc,(select IsBusinessActiveLW from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IsBusinessActiveLW, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, pt.ProducerCode,pt.StatusKey from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt,Policy p,Status s, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and p.policykey=pt.policykey and pt.statuskey=s.statuskey and pt.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select count(*) SubproducerCount,SubProducerAccess,SendQuoteLetter as sendDocumentToInsured,Producer_email as SubProducerEmailAddress from Subproducer where ProducerCode=#ProducerCode# group by SubProducerAccess,Producer_email,SendQuoteLetter

select f.VersionSequence,pt.AccountKey,pt.TransactionSequence,pt.ProducerCode,pt.ProducerCode as ProducerCodeInsured from PolicyTransaction pt inner join Quote q on q.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence inner join firmlw f on f.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey where q.PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y'

select a.AccountName, adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.StateCode as initialStateCode from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select pt.InvoicedPremium from quote q, policytransaction pt where q.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised ='Y' and q.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select pt.InvoicedPremium from quote q, policytransaction pt where q.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised ='Y' and q.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

sqlMap.select: select pc.CoverageSequence, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.PolicyKey, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsDollarDefense, pc.IsManualPremium from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q, RatingTrace rt where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey=pt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=pt.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=q.TransactionSequence and pc.PolicyKey=rt.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence=rt.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and pc.PolicyKey =#PolicyKey#

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.Premium, pc.RetroActiveDate, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey from PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l,Deductibles d where pc.CoverageSequence=#CoverageSequence# and l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pc.TransactionSequence =#TransactionSequence#

select AccountKey, AccountID, AccountName, Website, AccountEmail, AccountVersion, LoginID, secondaryEmail, substring(AccountName,1,15) as ContextAccountName from Account where AccountKey = #AccountKey#
sqlMap.update: update PolicyTransaction set StatusKey=7,LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# ,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select TransactionSequence, ChequeNumber, Amount, ContactPerson, ContactPhone, FinanceCompanyName, Detail, TransactionID, TransactionDate, TransactionStatus, PaymentMode, PaymentDetailId from PaymentDetail where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence=#FinalisedQuote_TransactionSequence# and PaymentDetailId=(select max(PaymentDetailId) from PaymentDetail where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence=#FinalisedQuote_TransactionSequence#)

select adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip as BillingZipCode, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.StateCode as initialStateCode from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select ProducerCode,LogoImagePath,SPContactName,SPContactAddress,SPWebsite,SPCompanyName,SPPhoneNumber,CallImagePath,SPConatctEmailId,IsActive,ProducerName,NewCommission, RenewalCommission,State,StreetAddress,SPZip,SPCity,Producer_email,Date_added,SendQuoteLetter,SendRenewalSolicitation,Archive,SubProducerAccess,Signature,Fax,IndicationAccess, BillingContactName,BillingContactNumber,BillingContactEmail,CompleteAddress,CreditcardAccess as creditCardAccess,SubProducerPolicyIssuedAccess,SignatureText,EmailSignature,SignatureText2,SignatureText3,IsDriect from subproducer where ProducerCode =#ProducerCode#

SELECT InvoicedPremium AS PremiumAmount FROM PolicyTransaction pt INNER JOIN Policy p on p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey INNER JOIN Quote q on q.PolicyKey = p.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence where q.IsThisOptionFinalised = 'Y' and p.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select Fax,CompleteAddress,LogoImagePath,ProducerName, Producer_email,NewCommission,RenewalCommission,SendQuoteLetter,SendRenewalSolicitation,StreetAddress,SPCity,State,SPZip,Archive,Date_added,SubProducerAccess,Signature,SPContactName,SPWebsite,SPPhoneNumber,EmailSignature,SignatureText2,SignatureText3,count(ProducerId)as SubproducerCount,IsDriect,SubProducerPolicyIssuedAccess from SubProducer where ProducerCode IN (select ProducerCode from policyTransaction where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#) group by Fax,CompleteAddress,LogoImagePath,ProducerName, Producer_email,NewCommission,RenewalCommission,SendQuoteLetter,SendRenewalSolicitation,StreetAddress,SPCity,State,SPZip,Archive,Date_added,SubProducerAccess,Signature,SPContactName,SPWebsite,SPPhoneNumber,ProducerId,EmailSignature,SignatureText2,SignatureText3,IsDriect,SubProducerPolicyIssuedAccess

select dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as FinalizedPremium from Policytransaction pt, quote q where q.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised ='Y' and q.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select top 1 p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber, p.IsFullQuote, p.IsQuickQuote, (CASE p.IsFullQuote WHEN 'Y' THEN 'FullQuote' ELSE 'QuickQuote' END) as FullQuick, DATEDIFF(dd, p.InsuredUpdateTimeStamp, #LastUpdateTimeStamp#) as AppDays, p.PolicyKey,p.isUncompletedData ,p.PolicyEffectiveDate, a.AccountName, pt.TransactionSequence, pt.PolicyExpirationDate, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey ,adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode=adds.StateCode) StateDesc, adds.Address1, (CASE p.PolicyStatusKey WHEN '2' THEN CASE isNull(pt.ProducerCode,'') WHEN '' THEN s.StatusDesc + '(R)' ELSE s.StatusDesc + '(R) (P)' END ELSE CASE isNull(pt.ProducerCode,'') WHEN '' THEN s.StatusDesc ELSE s.StatusDesc + '(P)' END END) as StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey,p.PolicyStatusKey,pt.TransactionTypeKey,f.IsBasicPage,f.IsGeneralPage,f.IsEntertainmentPage,f.IsTaxPage,f.IsEnvironmentalPage,f.IsSecuritiesPage,f.IsTitlePage,f.IsWillsEstatePage,f.IsPlaintiffPage,f.IsRealEstatePage,f.IsFinancialInsPage,f.IsIntellectPropPage,f.IsCorporatePage,f.FirstReviewUserID, f.VersionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, p.AppCreatedDate, adds.CountyDesc,f.IsQuickQuotePage, f.NumberOfLawyers, f.IsFirmReferred,f.IsQuoteViewedByInsured,f.IsViewed,f.IsRenewed,f.IsRenewalReview from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa, PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.MarketableProductKey=2 and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and p.PolicyKey=#PreviousPolicyKey# order by pt.TransactionSequence asc

select p.PolicyNumber, p.IsFullQuote, p.IsQuickQuote, p.PolicyKey, p.isUncompletedData, p.PolicyEffectiveDate, a.AccountName, pt.TransactionSequence, pt.PolicyExpirationDate, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey, adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, adds.Address1, pt.StatusKey, p.PolicyStatusKey, pt.TransactionTypeKey, f.FirstReviewUserID, f.VersionSequence, pc.CoverageSequence, p.AppCreatedDate, adds.CountyDesc from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds, Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.MarketableProductKey=2 and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and f.VersionSequence=(select max(VersionSequence) from firmlw where policykey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.TransactionSequence = (select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey = p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence = (select min(CoverageSequence) from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey = p.PolicyKey) and p.isUncompletedData='N' and p.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.Premium, pc.RetroActiveDate, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.IsDollarDefense, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey,pc.OccuranceLimit as ocLimit,pc.AggregateLimit as aggLimit,pc.AggregateDeductible as aggDeductible from PolicyCoverage pc, Limits l,Deductibles d where pc.CoverageSequence=#CoverageSequence# and l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pc.TransactionSequence =#TransactionSequence#

delete from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and CoverageSequence not in (#CoverageSequence#)
sqlMap.update: update Quote set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, TotalPremiumFirstRange=Null, IsMinimumPremium=Null where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence=#TransactionSequence#

update RatingTrace set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, XmlOutputDatafromRating=Null, XmlInputDatatoRating=Null where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and TransactionSequence=#TransactionSequence# and RatingTraceSequence=#RatingTraceSequence#
sqlMap.select: select cd.CommentKey, cd.CommentUploaded, cd.CommentUploadedBy, cd.UploadedTime,p.QuoteNumber,(select AgentName from UserDetails where UserNo = cd.CommentUploadedBy) AgentName from CommentDetail cd,Policy p where cd.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where AccountID = #AccountID#) and p.PolicyKey = cd.PolicyKey and p.isUncompletedData = 'N' order by cd.LastUpdateTimeStamp desc

select adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, (select IsBusinessActive from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IsBusinessActive,(select IssueMailAcc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IssueMailAcc, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, adds.StateCode as initialStateCode from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#
select AccountKey, AccountID, AccountName, Website, AccountEmail, AccountVersion, LoginID, secondaryEmail, substring(AccountName,1,15) as AccountName from Account where AccountKey = #AccountKey#

select dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as ContextPremium from quote q, policytransaction pt where q.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised ='Y' and q.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update: update policy set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#
update CommentDetail set LastUpdateTimeStamp=#LastUpdateTimeStamp#,LastUpdateUserID=#LastUpdateUserID#, CommentUploadedBy=#LastUpdateUserID# where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey# and CommentKey=#CommentKey#
sqlMap.select: select d.DeductibleSequence,l.LimitSequence, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.AggregateLimit),1),2) as AggregateLimit, PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,pc.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as OccuranceLimit, pc.CoverageSequence, pc.Premium, pc.RetroActiveDate, pc.IsClaimOptionType, pc.IsClaimExpensesType, pc.TransactionSequence, pc.SOISequence, pc.CoverageKey, pc.AggregateDeductible, pc.OccuranceDeductible, pc.PolicyKey, pc.MarketableProductKey from PolicyCoverage pc, PolicyTransaction pt, Limits l,Deductibles d, Quote q where l.AggregateLimit = pc.AggregateLimit and l.OccuranceLimit=pc.OccuranceLimit and l.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and d.AggregateDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.OccuranceDeductible=pc.AggregateDeductible and d.CoverageKey = pc.CoverageKey and pc.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and pt.PolicyKey = q.PolicyKey and pc.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence = q.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised='Y' and pc.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select IndicationAccess from subproducer where ProducerCode=#ProducerCode#

select PolicyStatusKey as PolicyStatusDesc,Direct_SubProducedKey as ProducerCode1,FirstReviewerUserNo as EligibleFirstReviewerfilter, BrokerID as BrokerKey, CarrierID as CarrierKey, BrokerID, CarrierID, isBrokered From ProfileFilter Where UserNo=#LastUpdateUserID#

select ud.AgentEmail, ud.AgentState, ud.PassWord, ud.UserNo, ud.AgentName, ud.LicenseNumber, ud.IsActiveAgent, ud.EligibleFirstReviewer, ud.AliasEmail,ud.UserNo as LastUpdateUserID from UserDetails ud where AgentEmail=#AgentEmail#
Select ProducerCode,ProducerCode as ProducerCode2, ProducerCode as ProducerCodefilter,ProducerCode as ProducerCode_search from SubproducerUserdetails Where UserNo=#LastUpdateUserID#

select IndicationAccess from subproducer where ProducerCode=#ProducerCode#

select top 10 p.PolicyKey,case when f.isManualLostworkq='Y' then 'Manual' end as isManualLostworkq,ud.agentname as last_updated_by,convert(varchar, f.LostWorkq_UpdatedTimeStamp, 120) as LastUpdatedTimeStamp from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa ,userdetails ud, PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and ud.UserNo = f.LostWorkq_UpdateUserID and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.MarketableProductKey = 2 and pc.CoverageKey = 3 and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=(select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence=(select min(CoverageSequence)from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and f.isManualLostworkq='Y' order by f.LostWorkq_UpdatedTimeStamp desc

select PolicyStatusKey as PolicyStatusDesc,Direct_SubProducedKey as ProducerCode1,FirstReviewerUserNo as EligibleFirstReviewerfilter, BrokerID as BrokerKey, CarrierID as CarrierKey, BrokerID, CarrierID, isBrokered From ProfileFilter Where UserNo=#LastUpdateUserID#

select p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber,p.IsFullQuote,p.IsQuickQuote ,p.PolicyKey,p.isUncompletedData ,p.PolicyEffectiveDate, a.AccountName,a.AccountEmail, pt.TransactionSequence, pt.PolicyExpirationDate, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey ,adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode,adds.Address1 ,adds.WorkPhone, s.StatusDesc,pt.StatusKey,p.PolicyStatusKey,pt.TransactionTypeKey,f.IsBasicPage,f.IsGeneralPage,f.IsEntertainmentPage,f.IsTaxPage,f.IsEnvironmentalPage,f.IsTitlePage,f.IsWillsEstatePage, f.IsPlaintiffPage,f.IsRealEstatePage,f.IsFinancialInsPage,f.IsCorporatePage,f.FirstReviewUserID , f.VersionSequence, f.IsRealEstateCommercialPage, f.IsRealEstateResidentialPage, pc.CoverageSequence, pt.TotalPremium as Premium from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey = pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.isUncompletedData='N' and a.AccountEmail= #InsuredLoginID# and adds.WorkPhone=#InsuredPassword#

sqlMap.select: select p.QuoteNumber, p.PolicyNumber,p.IsFullQuote,p.IsQuickQuote ,p.PolicyKey,p.isUncompletedData ,p.PolicyEffectiveDate, a.AccountName, substring(a.AccountName,1,15) as ContextAccountName, a.AccountEmail, pt.TransactionSequence, pt.PolicyExpirationDate, a.AccountID, a.AccountKey, adds.AddressKey, adds.StateCode, adds.Address1 ,adds.WorkPhone, s.StatusDesc, pt.StatusKey, p.PolicyStatusKey, pt.TransactionTypeKey, f.IsFirmPage, f.IsAopPage, f.IsPracticePage, f.IsCoveragePage, f.IsCorporatePage, f.IsEnvironmentalPage, f.IsFinancialInsPage, f.IsPlaintiffPage,f.IsRealEstatePage,f.IsTaxPage,f.IsTitlePage,f.IsWillsEstatePage, f.FirstReviewUserID , f.VersionSequence, f.IsRealEstateCommercialPage, f.IsRealEstateResidentialPage,f.isNewApp, pc.CoverageSequence, dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.TotalPremium) as Premium, adds.CountyDesc, f.ContactPerson from Policy p, Account a, FirmLW f, Address adds,Status s, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa , PolicyCoverage pc where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and f.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and s.StatusKey =pt.StatusKey and p.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and p.PolicyStatusKey=pt.TransactionTypeKey and f.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and p.PolicyKey = pc.PolicyKey and pt.TransactionSequence = pc.TransactionSequence and pt.TransactionSequence=(select min(TransactionSequence) from PolicyTransaction where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pc.CoverageSequence=(select min(CoverageSequence)from PolicyCoverage where PolicyKey=p.PolicyKey) and pt.PolicyKey in (select PolicyKey from Policy where isUncompletedData='N') and a.LoginID= #AccountEmail#

select adds.AddressKey, adds.Address1, adds.Address2, adds.City, adds.StateCode, adds.AddressTypeKey, adds.Zip, adds.Zip4, adds.HomePhone, adds.WorkPhone, adds.WorkExt, adds.MobilePhone, adds.CountyDesc, adds.CountryDesc, adds.Street, adds.otherPhone, adds.countyKey, adds.cityKey, (select StatusDesc from Status where StatusKey = pt.StatusKey) as StatusDesc, (select IsBusinessActiveLW from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as IsBusinessActiveLW, (select StateDesc from State where StateCode = adds.StateCode) as StateDesc, pt.ProducerCode,pt.StatusKey from Account a, Address adds, PolicyTransaction pt, AccountAddress aa where a.AccountKey =pt.AccountKey and aa.AccountKey = a.AccountKey and aa.AddressKey=adds.AddressKey and pt.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and pt.TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence#

select dbo.getAmountFormat(pt.InvoicedPremium) as ContextPremium from quote q, policytransaction pt where q.PolicyKey = pt.PolicyKey and q.TransactionSequence = pt.TransactionSequence and q.IsThisOptionFinalised ='Y' and q.PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
